Quit lumping them together — they don't drive the same outcomes across pain, disability, and sensorimotor function, so your choice of label actually matters.

items.title: Differences in Psychological Readiness and Quadriceps Strength Symmetry Based on Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction Graft Type in Military Academy Cadets.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study of military academy cadets (n=120) found differences in psychological readiness and quadriceps strength symmetry based on ACL reconstruction graft type (autograft vs. allograft).
items.curatedReason: ACL重建后移植物类型对心理准备和股四头肌力量对称性的影响，是指导康复方案的重要考量。这项针对军事院校学员的研究表明，不同移植物类型可能影响这些关键恢复指标，提示你在制定个体化康复计划时，应将移植物选择纳入考量。
items.titleZh: 军事院校学员前交叉韧带重建术后不同移植物类型对心理准备和股四头肌力量对称性的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项针对军事院校学员的横断面研究（n=120）发现，前交叉韧带重建术后，不同移植物类型（自体移植物与同种异体移植物）对心理准备和股四头肌力量对称性存在差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: The impact of ACL reconstruction graft type on psychological readiness and quadriceps strength symmetry is a critical consideration for guiding rehabilitation protocols. This study on military cadets suggests different graft types may affect these key recovery metrics, indicating you should consider graft choice when developing individualized rehab plans.

items.title: Sensory Stimulation, Physical Therapy Effective at Improving Gait Performance in PD | AJMC
items.summary: AJMC reported that sensory stimulation and physical therapy are effective at improving gait performance in patients with Parkinson's disease, along with electrical stimulation and balance interventions.
items.curatedReason: AJMC报道了感觉刺激和物理治疗在改善帕金森病步态表现方面的有效性。这篇文章作为回顾性报道，虽然不是原始研究，但它再次确认了多种物理治疗干预（包括电刺激、身体活动、平衡训练）对PD患者步态的积极作用，能增强你临床选择的信心。
items.titleZh: 感觉刺激与物理治疗有效改善帕金森病步态表现
items.summaryZh: AJMC 报道指出，感觉刺激和物理治疗（包括电刺激与平衡干预）可有效改善帕金森病患者步态。
items.curatedReasonEn: AJMC rounds up the evidence confirming sensory stimulation and physical therapy move the needle on gait in PD. This isn't a single original trial — it's a signal that the aggregated evidence on electrical stimulation, balance work, and physical activity is solid enough for you to stop hesitating and start implementing.

items.title: We Thought You'd Never Ask: Insights From the Health of Elite Retired Australian Female Athletes Survey.
items.summary: A survey of elite retired Australian female athletes found insights into their long-term mental, brain, cardiovascular, musculoskeletal health, and general well-being, highlighting historical underrepresentation in research.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对澳大利亚精英女性退役运动员健康状况的调查，揭示了她们在心理、脑部、心血管和肌肉骨骼健康方面的长期挑战。在运动康复中，应更关注女性运动员的特殊需求，制定更全面的退役后健康管理方案。
items.titleZh: 我们以为你从不问：澳大利亚精英女性退役运动员健康调查的见解
items.summaryZh: 一项针对澳大利亚精英女性退役运动员的调查，揭示了她们在心理、脑部、心血管、肌肉骨骼健康和总体幸福感方面的长期状况，突显了此前研究中对女性运动员代表性不足的问题。
items.curatedReasonEn: This survey of elite retired Australian female athletes reveals long-term challenges in mental, brain, cardiovascular, and musculoskeletal health. In sports rehabilitation, you must address the unique needs of female athletes and develop more comprehensive post-retirement health management plans.

items.title: Transparency does not equal evidence: a multidimensional quality and guideline concordance analysis of YouTube videos on low back pain self-management | Journal of Public Health | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A study analyzed the quality and guideline concordance of YouTube videos on low back pain self-management, finding that transparency does not always equate to evidence-based content.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究分析了YouTube上腰痛自我管理视频的质量和指南一致性。作为PT，你需要警惕患者可能从非专业渠道获取的错误信息，这篇研究能帮助你了解患者信息来源的现状，并能更好地教育患者进行正确的自我管理。
items.titleZh: 透明度≠循证：YouTube腰痛自我管理视频的质量与指南一致性分析
items.summaryZh: 该研究对YouTube腰痛自我管理视频进行多维度质量分析，发现视频的透明度并不等同于内容遵循循证指南。
items.curatedReasonEn: Your patients are watching this stuff. This study arms you with the specific failings of YouTube's most-viewed low back pain self-management videos so you can directly debunk them in the clinic.

items.title: Cryotherapy combined with standard rehabilitation and early functional recovery after knee arthroplasty: a retrospective cohort study | BMC Musculoskeletal Disorders | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study evaluated cryotherapy combined with standard rehabilitation for early functional recovery after knee arthroplasty.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性队列研究评估了冷疗联合标准康复在膝关节置换术后早期功能恢复中的效果。如果你在管理膝关节置换术后患者，这项研究可以帮助你评估冷疗作为辅助手段的有效性，尤其在早期康复阶段。
items.titleZh: 冷疗联合标准康复能否加速膝关节置换术后早期功能恢复：一项回顾性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 这项回顾性队列研究评估了冷疗联合标准康复对膝关节置换术后早期功能恢复的影响，为冷疗作为辅助手段的有效性提供数据。
items.curatedReasonEn: Cryotherapy is cheap and common, but the evidence for adding it to standard rehab post-TKA is weak. This retrospective study won't settle the debate, so don't oversell the modality's impact to your patients based on this design.

items.title: [Correspondence] Minocycline for acute ischaemic stroke: limitations of the EMPHASIS trial
items.summary: A correspondence piece highlights several design features that temper confidence in the immediate generalizability of the EMPHASIS trial, which reported a modest increase in 90-day functional outcomes with minocycline for acute ischemic stroke.
items.curatedReason: 这篇评论指出了 EMPHASIS 试验中米诺环素治疗急性缺血性卒中在设计上的局限性。作为神经康复医师，你在考虑神经保护剂时，应警惕单一试验结果的普适性，并结合试验的详细设计缺陷，避免在临床实践中过度解读或推广。
items.titleZh: 米诺环素治疗急性缺血性卒中：EMPHASIS 试验的局限性
items.summaryZh: 一篇通讯文章指出，EMPHASIS 试验中米诺环素治疗急性缺血性卒中在设计上存在多处限制，使其 90 天功能结局的适度改善结果难以立即推广。
items.curatedReasonEn: This commentary highlights design limitations in the EMPHASIS trial of minocycline for acute ischemic stroke. As a neurorehabilitation clinician, when considering neuroprotective agents, you should be cautious about generalizing single trial results and avoid over-interpreting or over-promoting them in clinical practice, given the detailed design flaws.

items.title:
Comparative Effects of High-Velocity Low-Amplitude (HVLA) Thrust and Muscle Energy Technique (MET) on Shoulder Mobility and Pain in Patients with Adhesive Capsulitis 
							| Journal of Health, Wellness and Community Research
items.summary: This study compared the effects of high-velocity low-amplitude (HVLA) thrust and muscle energy technique (MET) on shoulder mobility and pain in patients with adhesive capsulitis.
items.curatedReason: HVLA 和 MET 治冻结肩的直接对比少见，这是它唯一的价值——样本小、期刊弱，结论别太当真。冻结肩分期才是手法选择的主轴：冷冻期上激进 HVLA 风险收益比不划算，解冻期两种都能用。
items.titleZh: HVLA高速低幅冲击与肌肉能量技术对冻结肩活动度及疼痛的效果对比
items.summaryZh: 该研究在粘连性关节囊炎患者中对比了HVLA冲击手法与MET对肩关节活动度和疼痛的效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: A rare head-to-head of HVLA and MET for adhesive capsulitis is the only reason to read this—but the sample is small and the journal weak, so don't rewrite your protocols. The stage of frozen shoulder should still dictate your technique choice; aggressive HVLA in the freezing stage is a bad bet.

items.title:
Digital Rehabilitation Interventions for Musculoskeletal Disorders: Clinical Effectiveness and Implementation Challenges
							| Quality in Sport
items.summary: A review examined the clinical effectiveness and implementation challenges of digital rehabilitation interventions for musculoskeletal disorders.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述探讨了数字康复干预在肌肉骨骼疾病中的临床效果和实施挑战。随着远程医疗和数字疗法的发展，了解这些工具的有效性和实际应用障碍，能帮助你更好地规划和采纳数字康复方案。
items.titleZh: 肌肉骨骼疾病的数字化康复干预：临床效果与实施挑战综述
items.summaryZh: 该综述梳理了数字化康复干预在肌肉骨骼疾病中的临床有效性证据及实际推广面临的实施障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: Digital rehab tools are flooding the market, but this review tells you where the evidence holds and where it's just marketing. Pay attention to the implementation barriers—they're where your clinical judgment saves a protocol from failing.

items.title: 肩關節鏡術後復健怎麼做才對？旋轉肌袖、Bankart、SLAP、五十肩實證指南
items.summary: A comprehensive Chinese evidence-based guideline details post-arthroscopy rehabilitation protocols for rotator cuff, Bankart, SLAP, and adhesive capsulitis, emphasizing activity timing based on tear size.
items.curatedReason: 这篇中文指南详细阐述了肩关节镜术后（旋转肌袖、Bankart、SLAP、五十肩）的实证康复方案，并强调了根据撕裂大小决定早期活动时机的重要性。如果你在中文市场执业或服务中文患者，这提供了最新且基于证据的临床指导，可以直接用于你的康复计划制定。
items.titleZh: 肩关节镜术后康复实证指南：旋转肌袖、Bankart、SLAP及五十肩
items.summaryZh: 这份详尽的中文实证指南规定了旋转肌袖、Bankart、SLAP及五十肩关节镜术后的康复方案，强调根据撕裂大小决定活动时机。
items.curatedReasonEn: If you treat Chinese-speaking patients or practice in a Chinese-language market, this evidence-based guideline for post-arthroscopy protocols gives you a direct, clinically ready roadmap that respects tear-size-specific timing.
items.titleEn: Evidence-Based Guidelines for Post-Arthroscopic Shoulder Rehab: Rotator Cuff, Bankart, SLAP & Frozen Shoulder

items.title: Mean Arterial Pressure Augmentation for Acute Traumatic Spinal Cord Injury: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis of Neurological Recovery and Mortality
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis assessed the impact of mean arterial pressure augmentation (85-90 mmHg) on neurological recovery and mortality following acute traumatic spinal cord injury.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析评估了创伤性脊髓损伤后平均动脉压维持在85-90 mmHg对神经功能恢复和死亡率的影响。如果你在重症监护或早期脊髓损伤康复团队中工作，了解这一血流动力学管理策略的证据，有助于你理解患者的整体医疗管理和预后。
items.titleZh: 急性创伤性脊髓损伤的平均动脉压强化管理：神经功能恢复与死亡率的系统综述及Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 该系统综述与Meta分析评估了将平均动脉压维持在85–90 mmHg对急性创伤性脊髓损伤后神经功能恢复及死亡率的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This meta-analysis on MAP augmentation targets for acute SCI recovery hands you the specific hemodynamic numbers your ICU colleagues are chasing, so you can align your early rehab expectations and avoid clashing with the medical team's goals.

items.title: Physiotherapists' perception of barriers and facilitators to the implementation of digital health interventions: a scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review summarized physical therapists' perceptions of barriers and facilitators to implementing digital health interventions (DHIs), highlighting challenges despite DHIs' potential to enhance physiotherapy.
items.curatedReason: 这项综述总结了物理治疗师对数字健康干预（DHIs）实施障碍和促进因素的看法。它明确指出，尽管DHIs潜力巨大，但实际应用存在阻力。作为临床医师，你应该了解这些障碍，并积极参与到DHIs的设计和评估中，以推动其更有效、更广泛地融入日常实践。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗师对数字健康干预实施障碍和促进因素的看法：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述总结了物理治疗师对数字健康干预（DHIs）实施障碍和促进因素的看法，强调了尽管DHIs在增强物理治疗方面潜力巨大，但仍面临挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review summarizes physical therapists' perceptions of barriers and facilitators to implementing digital health interventions (DHIs). It explicitly states that despite the immense potential of DHIs, there are resistances to their actual application. As a clinician, you should understand these barriers and actively participate in the design and evaluation of DHIs to promote their more effective and widespread integration into daily practice.

items.title: The Effect of Duration of Supervised Rehabilitation on Outcomes Following Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction: A Systematic Review.
items.summary: A systematic review aimed to elucidate the associations between the duration of supervised rehabilitation and functional outcomes following anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction (ACLR), including re-injury risk.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述探讨了ACL重建后监督下康复的时长对预后的影响。了解监督康复与功能结局的关联，有助于你优化康复流程，确定何时可安全过渡到独立训练，以及如何最大化患者收益并减少再损伤风险。
items.titleZh: 监督下康复时长对前交叉韧带重建术后预后的影响：一项系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述旨在阐明监督下康复时长与前交叉韧带重建术后功能结局（包括再损伤风险）之间的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review investigates the impact of supervised rehabilitation duration on outcomes after ACL reconstruction. Understanding the association between supervised rehab and functional outcomes helps you optimize rehab processes, determine safe transitions to independent training, and maximize patient benefits while reducing reinjury risk.

items.title: Prevalence of Pelvic Floor Dysfunction Symptoms in Female Marathon Runners: A Cross-Sectional Study of the Santiago Marathon, Chile | International Urogynecology Journal | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A cross-sectional study of the Santiago Marathon in Chile investigated the prevalence of pelvic floor dysfunction symptoms in female marathon runners.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究调查了女性马拉松跑者盆底功能障碍症状的患病率。如果你从事运动康复，尤其是女性运动员，这项发现提醒你需要重视高强度运动对盆底功能的影响，并在评估和训练中纳入相关考量。
items.titleZh: 女性马拉松跑者盆底功能障碍症状患病率：智利圣地亚哥马拉松的横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 这项横断面研究调查了智利圣地亚哥马拉松女性跑者的盆底功能障碍症状患病率，揭示了高强度耐力运动对盆底的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: Your female runners are almost certainly not telling you about their pelvic floor symptoms. This cross-sectional data gives you the prevalence numbers to justify screening it in every female endurance athlete, no matter what they initially present for.

items.title: Association Between Outpatient Physical Therapist Personality and Patient Management Outcomes: A Preliminary Study.
items.summary: A preliminary cross-sectional study investigated whether outpatient physical therapist personality traits are associated with patient management outcomes, suggesting non-medical factors' impact.
items.curatedReason: 这项初步研究探讨了门诊物理治疗师人格特质与患者管理结果之间的关联，提示了非医学因素对患者康复的重要性。这提醒你在团队建设和专业发展中，应关注治疗师的沟通能力和情商，这些软技能可能对患者依从性和最终效果产生积极影响。
items.titleZh: 门诊物理治疗师人格特质与患者管理结果的关联：一项初步研究
items.summaryZh: 一项初步横断面研究调查了门诊物理治疗师人格特质是否与患者管理结果相关联，提示了非医学因素的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This preliminary study explores the association between outpatient physical therapist personality traits and patient management outcomes, suggesting the importance of non-medical factors in patient rehabilitation. This reminds you that in team building and professional development, you should focus on therapists' communication skills and emotional intelligence, as these soft skills can positively impact patient adherence and ultimate outcomes.

items.title: Finding Voice: Experiences of Underrepresented Minority Faculty in Physical Therapist Education: A Qualitative Study.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored the experiences of underrepresented minority faculty in US physical therapist education, identifying challenges like unpaid responsibilities, marginalization, and advancement barriers.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究揭示了美国物理治疗教育中少数族裔教师面临的挑战和障碍，例如额外无偿责任和边缘化。这提醒你，在推动物理治疗教育多样性和包容性方面，行业仍有大量工作要做，以确保培养的专业人才更好地代表服务人群。
items.titleZh: 发现声音：美国物理治疗师教育中少数族裔教师的经历：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究探讨了美国物理治疗师教育中少数族裔教师的经历，指出了包括额外无偿责任、边缘化和晋升障碍等挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study reveals the challenges and barriers faced by underrepresented minority faculty in US physical therapist education, such as additional unpaid responsibilities and marginalization. This reminds you that the profession still has much work to do in promoting diversity and inclusion in physical therapy education to ensure that trained professionals better represent the populations they serve.

items.title: Short-term effects of diaphragmatic myofascial release on pain, mobility, and disability in chronic nonspecific low back pain: a randomized sham-controlled trial | Scientific Reports
items.summary: A randomized sham-controlled trial investigated the short-term effects of diaphragmatic myofascial release on pain, mobility, and disability in patients with chronic non-specific low back pain.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验探讨了膈肌筋膜松解术对慢性非特异性腰痛的短期效果。如果你在寻找新的手法治疗方案，这项研究提供了初步的证据，帮助你评估将其纳入临床实践的可行性。
items.titleZh: 膈肌肌筋膜松解对慢性非特异性腰痛疼痛、活动度与失能的短期效果：一项随机假对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项随机假对照试验研究膈肌肌筋膜松解对慢性非特异性腰痛患者的短期影响，初步验证了该手法在疼痛与功能改善上的效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: A sham-controlled RCT on diaphragmatic release for low back pain is the minimum level of evidence needed to justify this technique. The short-term effect size tells you whether it's worth adding to your session or just a clinical placebo.

items.title: Cost-utility of long-term exercise therapy in people with axial spondyloarthritis and severe functional limitations: a randomized, controlled trial | Rheumatology International | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: This randomized, controlled trial assessed the cost-utility of long-term exercise therapy in people with axial spondyloarthritis and severe functional limitations.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验评估了长期运动疗法对伴有严重功能受限的轴性脊柱关节炎患者的成本效益。如果您关注长期康复的效果和经济性，这项研究可以为您提供运动疗法在这一特定患者群体中的价值证据。
items.titleZh: 长期运动疗法对伴严重功能受限的轴性脊柱关节炎：一项 RCT 的成本-效用分析
items.summaryZh: 这项 RCT 评估了长期运动疗法在伴严重功能受限的轴性脊柱关节炎患者中的成本-效用，为康复经济学提供直接数据。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT puts a price tag on long-term exercise for axSpA with severe disability. Stop guessing whether your program is “worth it”—here’s cost-utility data you can cite when justifying rehab intensity and duration to payers.

items.title: GIRFT launches best practice tool to support primary care colleagues to assess and manage patients with spinal pain - Spinal Surgery News
items.summary: GIRFT (Getting It Right First Time) launched a best practice tool in the UK to assist primary care practitioners in assessing and managing patients with spinal pain.
items.curatedReason: 英国GIRFT推出了一款支持初级保健评估和管理脊柱疼痛患者的最佳实践工具。虽然针对初级保健，但你作为PT，了解上游的评估和管理流程，能帮助你更好地与初级保健医生协作，并理解患者转诊前的诊疗路径。
items.titleZh: GIRFT 发布脊柱疼痛评估管理最佳实践工具，面向英国初级保健
items.summaryZh: 英国 GIRFT 项目推出面向初级保健医生的脊柱疼痛评估与管理最佳实践工具，旨在优化诊疗路径。
items.curatedReasonEn: GIRFT drops a primary care spine pathway tool. You need to know what triage logic your patients went through before they land in rehab, so skim it—even if you’re not in the UK, the stratification framework sharpens your own clinical reasoning.

items.title: Effects of muscle energy technique and positional release technique on low back pain: A comparative study - Journal of Musculoskeletal Surgery and Research
items.summary: This comparative study examined the effects of muscle energy technique and positional release technique on low back pain.
items.curatedReason: 这项比较研究评估了肌肉能量技术（MET）和姿势释放技术对下腰痛的效果。如果您在临床实践中应用手法治疗，该研究能帮助您了解这两种技术在下腰痛管理中的相对有效性，指导您的手法选择。
items.titleZh: 肌肉能量技术与姿势释放技术对下腰痛的疗效比较
items.summaryZh: 一项比较研究显示，肌肉能量技术（MET）与姿势释放技术对下腰痛均有效果，但未报告显著组间差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: MET vs. positional release for low back pain—both work, no clear winner here. Pick whichever fits your flow, but don’t marry one technique based on this comparative study alone; the effect-size gap isn’t big enough to ditch either from your toolbox.

items.title: Pelvic floor workout may Reduce Postpartum Stress Urinary Incontinence: JAMA
items.summary: A report in JAMA suggests that pelvic floor workouts may significantly reduce postpartum stress urinary incontinence.
items.curatedReason: JAMA发表的这篇文章指出盆底肌锻炼可能减少产后压力性尿失禁。作为PT，如果你服务产后女性，这项重要发现可以强化你向患者推广和实施盆底肌康复训练的信心，并为你的临床实践提供有力证据。
items.titleZh: JAMA：盆底肌训练可减少产后压力性尿失禁
items.summaryZh: JAMA 报告指出，盆底肌训练可显著减少产后压力性尿失禁的发生。
items.curatedReasonEn: JAMA confirms pelvic floor training cuts postpartum SUI. If you see postpartum patients, you’re not “suggesting” a few exercises anymore—this is a non-negotiable core of your program. Use this level of evidence to lock in adherence early.

items.title: JMIR Research Protocols - Effects of a Home-Based Exercise Program Incorporating Mindfulness and Yoga on Balance and Mobility in People With Parkinson Disease: Protocol for a Randomized Controlled Trial
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial protocol aims to evaluate the effects of a home-based exercise program incorporating mindfulness and yoga on balance and mobility in people with Parkinson's disease.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验的方案旨在评估居家瑜伽结合正念的运动项目对帕金森病患者平衡和移动能力的影响。如果你在探索帕金森病的创新康复干预，该研究方案预示了一种可能有效且易于居家执行的干预手段。
items.titleZh: JMIR：居家正念瑜伽运动对帕金森病患者平衡与移动能力影响的 RCT 方案
items.summaryZh: 一项 RCT 方案将评估居家、融合正念与瑜伽的运动项目对帕金森病患者平衡与移动能力的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: A home-based mindfulness-yoga RCT protocol for Parkinson’s balance and mobility. Watch this space—if the results hold, this is a scalable, low-resource add-on your neuro patients will actually do. Pilots of this model now before the RCT drops so you’re not late to adopt.

items.title: Frontiers | Spinal cord stimulation to manage autonomic dysfunction after spinal cord injury: a systematic review
items.summary: This systematic review explored spinal cord stimulation to manage autonomic dysfunction after spinal cord injury.
items.curatedReason: 这篇系统综述探讨了脊髓电刺激在管理脊髓损伤后自主神经功能障碍方面的应用。如果您治疗脊髓损伤患者，了解这种新兴技术在改善自主神经功能方面的潜力，将有助于您拓宽治疗思路，并关注相关技术进展。
items.titleZh: 脊髓电刺激治疗脊髓损伤后自主神经功能障碍：系统综述
items.summaryZh: 该系统综述探讨脊髓电刺激管理脊髓损伤后自主神经功能障碍的证据，初步显示潜在获益但证据有限。
items.curatedReasonEn: Systematic review on SCS for autonomic dysfunction post-SCI—early, messy, but promising. Don’t jump to a referral based on this alone, because the evidence base is thin. Flag it in your neuro rehab radar so when clearer patient selection windows emerge, you’re ready.

items.title: [A 5-year follow-up study on quality of life and recurrence after endoscopic sinus surgery for chronic rhinosinusitis with nasal polyps in children].
items.summary: This 5-year follow-up study evaluates functional endoscopic sinus surgery (FESS) for pediatric chronic rhinosinusitis with nasal polyps, analyzing quality of life and recurrence rates.
items.curatedReason: 儿童鼻窦炎术后5年随访数据本身对PT没有直接指导价值——除非你在管理术后康复患者的活动耐受或颈部动力学，否则跳过。
items.titleZh: 儿童鼻息肉慢性鼻窦炎内镜手术5年随访研究：生活质量与复发。
items.summaryZh: 这项对儿童鼻息肉慢性鼻窦炎（CRSwNP）行功能性内镜鼻窦手术（FESS）的5年随访研究，旨在评估患者生活质量的动态变化及术后复发率，为临床决策提供证据。
items.curatedReasonEn: This 5-year follow-up study on pediatric chronic rhinosinusitis with nasal polyps after FESS provides quality of life and recurrence data. It's more clinical outcomes focused than PT specific, but relevant for understanding post-surgical pediatric patient trajectories.
items.journal: Zhonghua er bi yan hou tou jing wai ke za zhi = Chinese journal of otorhinolaryngology head and neck surgery

items.title: Clinical Characteristics and Outcomes of Pediatric Hemophagocytic Lymphohistocytosis: A Retrospective Study from a Tertiary Center in Jordan.
items.summary: A retrospective study from Jordan describes the clinical characteristics and outcomes of pediatric hemophagocytic lymphohistiocytosis (HLH), a severe hyperinflammatory syndrome.
items.curatedReason: 这是儿童血噬性淋巴组织细胞增多症的医学病例综述，与物理治疗无关，不要花时间。
items.titleZh: 儿童噬血细胞性淋巴组织细胞增生症的临床特征和结局：约旦一家三级中心的で的回顾性研究。
items.summaryZh: 一项来自约旦的回顾性研究描述了儿童噬血细胞性淋巴组织细胞增生症（HLH）的临床特征和结局，这是一种严重的过激炎症综合征。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective study describes clinical characteristics and outcomes of pediatric HLH in Jordan. While relevant to a rare pediatric condition, it offers limited direct application for physical therapists without specific PT outcome data.
items.journal: International journal of hematology-oncology and stem cell research

items.title: Telerehabilitation in Community Stroke Services: Mixed Methods Evaluation of Current Practice and Lessons for Sustained Use.
items.summary: This mixed-methods evaluation explores the current practice and lessons learned for sustained use of telerehabilitation in community stroke services, incorporating insights from clinical teams and stroke survivors.
items.curatedReason: 这项混合方法评估揭示了远程康复在社区卒中服务中的整合现状及持续使用经验。你应关注临床团队和患者的反馈，了解远程康复在卒中后实践中的优势和挑战，以优化你的远程服务交付。
items.titleZh: 社区卒中服务中的远程康复：对当前实践和持续使用经验的混合方法评估。
items.summaryZh: 这项混合方法评估研究了远程康复在社区卒中服务中的当前实践和持续使用经验，并吸取了临床团队和卒中患者的见解。
items.curatedReasonEn: This mixed methods evaluation sheds light on the current integration and sustained use of telerehabilitation in community stroke services. You should pay attention to clinical teams' and patients' feedback to understand the benefits and challenges in post-stroke practice, optimizing your telerehab service delivery.

items.title: Integrating multi-session transcranial direct current stimulation with routine physical therapy to improve quadriceps strength and activation in athletes during subacute recovery following ACL reconstruction: A double-blind RCT.
items.summary: A double-blind RCT (N=20) found that integrating multi-session anodal transcranial direct current stimulation with routine physical therapy improved quadriceps strength and activation in male athletes during subacute recovery post-ACL reconstruction.
items.curatedReason: 这项双盲 RCT 表明，在 ACLR 亚急性恢复期，多疗程经颅直流电刺激联合常规物理治疗能显著改善股四头肌力量和激活。对于膝关节术后患者，这是一个值得你考虑的神经调控辅助干预。
items.titleZh: 多疗程经颅直流电刺激联合常规物理治疗对 ACL 重建术后亚急性恢复期运动员股四头肌力量和激活的改善作用：一项双盲随机对照试验。
items.summaryZh: 一项双盲随机对照试验（N=20）发现，在 ACL 重建术后亚急性恢复期的男性运动员中，多疗程阳极经颅直流电刺激联合常规物理治疗能改善股四头肌力量和激活。
items.curatedReasonEn: This double-blind RCT indicates that multi-session tDCS combined with routine physical therapy significantly improves quadriceps strength and activation during subacute ACLR recovery. This neuromodulatory adjunct is worth considering for your post-knee surgery patients.

items.title: Cardiac Telerehabilitation Using a Smartwatch and a Gamified Smartphone App: Single-Arm Pre-Post Feasibility Study.
items.summary: A single-arm pre-post feasibility study demonstrated that cardiac telerehabilitation using a smartwatch and a gamified smartphone app is a practical and engaging alternative to conventional center-based CR.
items.curatedReason: 这项可行性研究表明，结合智能手表和游戏化手机应用的远程心脏康复（CTR）是可行的。你可以将其视为提高患者依从性和参与度的新策略，尤其在后疫情时代，远程方案的优化对你拓展心脏康复服务至关重要。
items.titleZh: 使用智能手表和游戏化智能手机应用的远程心脏康复：单臂前后可行性研究。
items.summaryZh: 一项单臂前后可行性研究表明，使用智能手表和游戏化智能手机应用的远程心脏康复是一种实用且吸引人的替代传统中心式心脏康复的方法。
items.curatedReasonEn: This feasibility study indicates that cardiac telerehabilitation (CTR) using a smartwatch and a gamified smartphone app is feasible. You can consider this a new strategy to enhance patient adherence and engagement, especially in the post-pandemic era, where optimizing remote programs is crucial for expanding your cardiac rehabilitation services.

items.title: Practice Areas, Skills, and Core Competencies of Advanced Practice Physiotherapists Working in Tertiary Care in Germany: Protocol for a 3-Round Delphi Study to Establish Expert Consensus.
items.summary: This protocol details a 3-round Delphi study to establish expert consensus on practice areas, skills, and core competencies for Advanced Practice Physiotherapists (APP) in tertiary care settings in Germany.
items.curatedReason: 本方案描述了德国三级医疗机构中高级实践物理治疗师（APP）的角色、技能和核心能力，能帮助你了解德国 APP 模式的发展方向和潜在实践范围，对你的职业发展和国际合作有参考价值。
items.titleZh: 德国三级医疗机构高级实践物理治疗师的实践领域、技能和核心能力：一项三轮德尔菲研究的协议，旨在建立专家共识。
items.summaryZh: 本方案描述了一项三轮德尔菲研究，旨在明确德国三级医疗机构高级实践物理治疗师（APP）的实践领域、所需技能和核心能力，以建立专家共识。
items.curatedReasonEn: This protocol outlines the roles, skills, and core competencies of Advanced Practice Physiotherapists (APP) in German tertiary care. It provides insight into the developing APP model in Germany, relevant for your professional development and international collaborations.

items.title: Exercise interventions for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain in middle-aged and older adults: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis confirms that exercise interventions significantly reduce pain and improve function in middle-aged and older adults with rotator cuff-related shoulder pain.
items.curatedReason: 这份系统综述确认了运动对中老年人肩袖相关疼痛的有效性——继续把运动作为一线干预，不需要再验证。
items.titleZh: 中老年成人旋转肌袖相关肩痛的运动干预：系统综述与荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述与荟萃分析证实，运动干预能显著减轻中老年成人旋转肌袖相关肩痛的疼痛并改善其功能。这为运动疗法作为一线治疗提供了有力支持。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis provides robust evidence that exercise interventions are effective for reducing pain and improving function in middle-aged and older adults with rotator cuff-related shoulder pain. The findings strongly support exercise as a primary treatment strategy.

items.title: Many Paths to Recovery: The Case for Treatment Pluralism.
items.summary: An editorial advocates for treatment pluralism in musculoskeletal pain, noting research hasn't identified a superior intervention and suggesting exercise and manual therapies have similar effects, likely due to non-specific factors.
items.curatedReason: 数十年研究都没找到肌骨疼痛的最优治疗，说明你不用纠结选哪个——运动和手法疗法效果相当，关键是非特异性因素和患者信心。别为了证明某个手段最好而浪费时间。
items.titleZh: 康复之路：支持治疗多元化的理由
items.summaryZh: 该社论提倡在肌肉骨骼疼痛治疗中采取多元化策略，指出数十年研究未能确定单一最优疗法。文章认为运动疗法和手法治疗的平均效果相似，可能由非特异性及情境因素介导，支持以患者为中心的多模式方法。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial argues for treatment pluralism in musculoskeletal pain, stating that decades of research haven't identified a consistently superior treatment. It supports the idea that exercise and manual therapies have broadly equivalent effects, likely mediated by non-specific and contextual factors, aligning with a patient-centered, multimodal approach.
items.journal: The Journal of orthopaedic and sports physical therapy

items.title: Dry needling and muscle mechanical properties in myofascial trigger points: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis found dry needling impacts muscle mechanical properties in myofascial trigger points, synthesizing evidence from RCTs.
items.curatedReason: 干针对肌筋膜触发点的机械性能确实有影响，这是 RCT 汇总的结论；但改善机械性能能否转化为临床获益还是另一回事，别把组织学改变当成疗效。
items.titleZh: 干针疗法与肌筋膜触发点的肌肉力学性质：一项系统综述与荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述与荟萃分析提供了关于干针疗法对肌筋膜触发点力学性质影响的有力证据。它综合了来自随机对照试验的结果，为理解该疗法的效果提供了清晰的认识。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis provides a strong evidence base on the effects of dry needling on myofascial trigger point mechanical properties. It synthesizes findings from RCTs, offering clarity on this modality's impact.
items.journal: The Journal of manual & manipulative therapy

items.title: Physiotherapist-related barriers and enablers to the implementation of high-value physiotherapy for chronic pain: a scoping review and narrative synthesis of 37 studies.
items.summary: A scoping review identified physiotherapist-related barriers and enablers to implementing high-value physiotherapy for chronic pain, suggesting practice patterns lag behind evidence.
items.curatedReason: 证据支持运动治疗慢性痛，你的实践却跟不上——这 37 项研究指出问题在你自己的行为和系统障碍，而不是证据不够；该反思为什么开不出运动处方。
items.titleZh: 理疗师在慢性疼痛高价值物理治疗实施中的障碍与促进因素：范围综述与叙事综合分析37项研究
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述识别了理疗师在慢性疼痛高价值物理治疗（如运动疗法）实施中的障碍与促进因素，表明临床实践模式往往滞后于循证证据，需要关注专业行为和系统性问题。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review identifies physiotherapist-related barriers and enablers to implementing high-value physiotherapy (like exercise) for chronic pain. It suggests that while evidence supports exercise, practice patterns often lag, indicating a need to address professional behaviors and system-level issues.

items.title: Is Knee Osteoarthritis an Inevitable Consequence for Athletes after Anterior Cruciate Ligament Injury?
items.summary: This perspective suggests anterior cruciate ligament (ACL) injury should be considered the beginning of a long-term knee health issue, potentially leading to osteoarthritis, requiring ongoing management.
items.curatedReason: 别把 ACL 重建看成终点，要当成长期膝关节健康管理的起点，术后回归运动不等于完事；患者需要终身监测，预防继发性关节炎。
items.titleZh: 运动员在前交叉韧带损伤后发生膝骨关节炎是必然结果吗？
items.summaryZh: 该观点文章提出，前交叉韧带（ACL）损伤应被视为长期膝关节健康状况的起点，可能导致创伤后膝骨关节炎。文章强调，需超越单纯的手术和重返运动，进行长期的膝关节健康管理。
items.curatedReasonEn: This perspective piece argues that anterior cruciate ligament (ACL) injury should be viewed as the start of a long-term knee health condition, potentially leading to osteoarthritis. It emphasizes the need for long-term management beyond immediate surgical reconstruction and return to sport.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Effect of Femoral Nerve Neurodynamic Techniques on Pain in Patellofemoral Pain Syndrome: A Randomised Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial found that adding femoral nerve neurodynamic techniques to standard care improved pain and function in patients with patellofemoral pain syndrome.
items.curatedReason: 这个 RCT 证实股神经神经动力技术加常规治疗能更好改善髌股关节痛的疼痛和功能，值得加入你的髌股关节痛工具箱。
items.titleZh: 股神经神经松动技术对髌股疼痛综合征疼痛的影响：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项针对髌股疼痛综合征（PFPS）患者的随机对照试验发现，在常规治疗基础上加用股神经神经松动技术，可显著改善疼痛和功能。这提示神经松动技术可作为PFPS管理的有效辅助手段。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT in patients with patellofemoral pain syndrome (PFPS) found that adding femoral nerve neurodynamic techniques to standard care resulted in greater improvements in pain and function. This suggests neurodynamic techniques could be a valuable adjunct for PFPS management.

items.title: Effectiveness of passive vs. assistive robotic gait training on functional recovery and neuroplasticity post-stroke: A randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: An RCT found assistive robotic gait training (RAGT) may lead to better functional recovery and neuroplasticity compared to passive RAGT in stroke patients.
items.curatedReason: 主动式机器人步态训练（RAGT）比被动式更能促进卒中后的功能恢复和神经可塑性，说明患者的主动参与度决定疗效，别单纯依赖设备被动驱动。
items.titleZh: 卒中后辅助与被动机器人步态训练对功能恢复和神经可塑性的效果：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验比较了卒中后辅助与被动机器人步态训练 (RAGT) 的效果，并探讨了神经可塑性。研究提示辅助性RAGT可能比被动性RAGT更能促进功能恢复，为优化机器人干预提供了指导。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT compares passive vs. assistive robotic gait training (RAGT) post-stroke, also exploring neuroplasticity. It suggests assistive RAGT may be more effective for functional recovery, providing guidance on optimizing robotic interventions.

items.title: Wearable Myoelectric Interface for Neurorehabilitation (MINT) to Recover Arm Activity After Stroke: A Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial found a wearable myoelectric interface (MINT) feasible for home-based neurorehabilitation post-stroke, showing improvements in arm activity.
items.curatedReason: 可穿戴肌电界面（MINT）在卒中慢性期居家神经康复可行且改善上肢功能，为远期患者提供了新选择；但样本量和随访时长需要确认。
items.titleZh: 用于卒中后神经康复的可穿戴肌电接口（MINT）以恢复上肢活动：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验评估了用于卒中后家庭神经康复的可穿戴肌电接口（MINT）的可行性及其减少异常协同激活的效果。结果显示MINT可行且能改善上肢活动，为慢性卒中康复提供了潜在工具。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT tested a wearable myoelectric interface (MINT) for home-based neurorehabilitation post-stroke, aiming to reduce abnormal co-activation. Findings suggest MINT is feasible and improves arm activity, offering a potential tool for chronic stroke recovery.

items.title: Visuospatial Working Memory Predicts Strategic Motor Learning With Visual Feedback During Gait After Stroke.
items.summary: Visuospatial working memory (VSWM) was found to predict strategic motor learning with visual feedback during post-stroke gait rehabilitation, suggesting personalized training approaches.
items.curatedReason: 你的患者视觉空间工作记忆能力强弱会决定他们是否从视觉反馈步态训练中获益——高能力患者才能有效整合视觉信息改善步态，低能力患者用视觉反馈可能白费力气，改用触觉或本体感觉线索更划算。
items.titleZh: 空间视觉工作记忆预测卒中后步态视觉反馈下的策略性运动学习
items.summaryZh: 研究发现，空间视觉工作记忆 (VSWM) 能够预测卒中后步态康复中利用视觉反馈进行的策略性运动学习。这一发现有助于通过识别可能从视觉反馈策略中获益更多的患者，来实现个性化的步态训练。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study found that visuospatial working memory (VSWM) predicts strategic motor learning with visual feedback during gait rehabilitation post-stroke. This insight can help personalize gait training by identifying patients who may benefit more from visual feedback strategies.

items.title: Association between Patellofemoral Conditions and the Incidence of ACL Injury: Could Patellofemoral Conditions be a Risk Factor for ACL Injury? A 10-year Population-Based Study.
items.summary: A 10-year population-based study suggests that prior patellofemoral conditions may be a risk factor for anterior cruciate ligament (ACL) injury, indicating a need for further research into this association.
items.curatedReason: 髌股关节疼痛既往史的患者ACL损伤风险确实升高，但机制还不明确——别只看表面关联，得琢磨清楚是运动学代偿、股四头肌激活不足还是别的什么，才能设计有效的预防计划。
items.titleZh: 髌股关节疾病与前交叉韧带损伤发生率之间的关联：髌股关节疾病是否为前交叉韧带损伤的风险因素？一项为期10年的基于人群的研究
items.summaryZh: 一项为期10年的基于人群的研究表明，既往的髌股关节状况可能与前交叉韧带 (ACL) 损伤发生率增加有关。这提示需要进一步研究连接这些病症的生物力学和神经肌肉因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This 10-year population-based study suggests a potential association between prior patellofemoral conditions and an increased incidence of ACL injury. This warrants further investigation into biomechanical and neuromuscular factors linking these conditions.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Effect of a multimodal exercise training program on sleep in older adults: a randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial demonstrated that a multimodal exercise training program improved sleep quality in older adults.
items.curatedReason: 多模式运动训练（力量、有氧、灵活性合并）确实改善了老年人睡眠质量——别只开单一训练了，整合型方案效果更扎实，特别是对睡眠紊乱的老年患者。
items.titleZh: 多模式运动训练计划对老年人睡眠质量的影响：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验发现，多模式运动训练计划能改善老年人的睡眠质量。这为支持运动干预在改善该人群睡眠障碍方面的作用提供了更多证据，并提供了一种实用的方法。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT found that a multimodal exercise training program improved sleep quality in older adults. This adds to the evidence supporting exercise interventions for sleep disturbances in this population, offering a practical approach.

items.title: Targeting neuromuscular deficits following anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction with spinal manipulation: A randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial found that spinal manipulation may help restore normal neuromuscular activation patterns during landing in individuals after ACL reconstruction.
items.curatedReason: 脊椎手法治疗能恢复ACL重建后的着地时神经肌肉激活模式，但这个结论基于单个RCT——在加入常规范围内之前，需要更多重复验证，别把它当万能钥匙。
items.titleZh: 采用脊柱手法矫正针对前交叉韧带重建术后神经肌肉缺陷：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验研究了脊柱手法矫正（SM）对前交叉韧带重建术（ACLR）患者单腿垂直落地过程中的神经肌肉激活模式的影响。结果提示SM可能有助于恢复正常的神经肌肉模式，值得作为辅助疗法考虑。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT investigated the effect of spinal manipulation (SM) on neuromuscular activation during landing post-ACL reconstruction (ACLR). It suggests SM may be beneficial in restoring normal neuromuscular patterns, warranting consideration as an adjunct therapy.
items.journal: Journal of electromyography and kinesiology : official journal of the International Society of Electrophysiological Kinesiology

items.title: Developing consensus on competency-based educational standards in orthopaedic manual physical therapy fellowship training: part 2: knowledge for specialty practice and professionalism.
items.summary: Part 2 of a series on OMPT fellowship training focuses on developing consensus-based competency standards for knowledge and professionalism, aiming to define advanced clinical education.
items.curatedReason: 这是关于OMPT研究生教学标准化的专业讨论，对培养项目有用，但跟你的日常临床决策关系不大——除非你在设计进修课程。
items.titleZh: 骨科手法物理治疗专科培训能力本位教育标准的共识制定：第二部分 专科实践与专业素养的知识
items.summaryZh: 该系列文章的第二部分，旨在就骨科手法物理治疗（OMPT）专科培训的能力本位教育标准达成共识，重点关注知识和专业素养。这对于提升OMPT教育水平至关重要，但主要面向专科培训层面。
items.curatedReasonEn: This paper, Part 2 of a series, discusses developing consensus on competency-based educational standards for Orthopaedic Manual Physical Therapy (OMPT) fellowship training, focusing on knowledge and professionalism. It's crucial for advancing OMPT education but addresses a specific training tier.
items.journal: The Journal of manual & manipulative therapy

items.title: Moving Forward Together. Part 5: Championing Physical Therapy Allyship and Advocacy for Indigenous Peoples With Musculoskeletal Pain.
items.summary: This article highlights the importance of physical therapist allyship and advocacy in improving musculoskeletal health for Indigenous Peoples, aligning with truth-telling and healing principles.
items.curatedReason: 原住民患者的肌骨疾病健康差距存在，你得承认自己可能带着文化盲区来看这些患者——改变的不是你的手法，是你的问诊角度和对患者社会决定因素的重视程度。
items.titleZh: 携手前行，第五部分：倡导物理治疗领域的盟友关系与倡导，促进原住民肌肉骨骼疼痛的健康
items.summaryZh: “携手前行”系列的第五篇文章，强调理疗师在改善原住民肌肉骨骼健康方面，盟友关系和倡导工作的重要性。这呼应了对殖民化影响的回应，并要求理疗师理解并践行相关概念。
items.curatedReasonEn: This article from the 'Moving Forward Together' series emphasizes the critical role of allyship and advocacy for physical therapists in improving the musculoskeletal health of Indigenous Peoples. It aligns with broader discussions on health equity and culturally competent care.
items.journal: The Journal of orthopaedic and sports physical therapy

items.title: Healthcare professionals' perception of prevalence and assessment of mental ill-health in stroke patients with and without aphasia - a national survey.
items.summary: A Swedish survey found healthcare professionals recognize high rates of mental ill-health post-stroke, especially in aphasic patients, but face challenges in assessment due to communication barriers.
items.curatedReason: 卒中后患者心理健康问题高发，失语患者更容易被你们漏诊——现有筛查工具对失语患者不适用，你需要学会用非言语方法识别抑郁和焦虑，或早转心理科。
items.titleZh: 瑞典卒中患者（有/无失语症）精神健康状况的医疗保健专业人员认知与评估：一项全国性调查
items.summaryZh: 一项瑞典全国性调查显示，医护人员认为卒中后精神健康不佳普遍存在，尤其是在失语症患者中，但沟通障碍阻碍了评估。这凸显了为该脆弱人群提供更好的精神健康评估工具和培训的需求。
items.curatedReasonEn: This Swedish national survey reveals that healthcare professionals perceive mental ill-health as common post-stroke, but communication impairments in aphasic patients hinder assessment. It highlights the need for better tools and training to address mental health in this vulnerable population.

items.title: THE COMPARATIVE EFFECTIVENESS OF INPATIENT VERSUS SKILLED NURSING FACILITY REHABILITATION USING LINKED ACUTE STROKE REGISTRY DATA.
items.summary: A retrospective study using linked registry data found inpatient rehabilitation facility (IRF) care for stroke patients was associated with a higher likelihood of returning home compared to skilled nursing facility (SNF) care.
items.curatedReason: 卒中患者住院康复中心的出院回家率确实比护理机构高，但这可能反映的是患者选择偏差而非疗效——入院时重症程度不同就没法直接比较，别仅以此理由非要患者进康复中心。
items.titleZh: 利用链接急性卒中登记数据比较住院康复机构与熟练护理机构的卒中康复疗效
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性研究利用链接的卒中登记数据，比较了住院康复机构 (IRF) 和熟练护理机构 (SNF) 对卒中患者的康复效果。结果发现，IRF 护理与更高的居家率相关，提示两类机构在护理强度或重点上存在差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective study compares inpatient rehabilitation facilities (IRFs) versus skilled nursing facilities (SNFs) for stroke patients using linked registry data. It found IRF care was associated with higher rates of returning home, suggesting differences in care intensity or focus.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: THE COMPARATIVE EFFECTIVENESS OF INPATIENT VERSUS SKILLED NURSING FACILITY REHABILITATION USING LINKED ACUTE STROKE REGISTRY DATA.

items.title: National survey of stroke rehabilitation services in Indonesia.
items.summary: A national survey described stroke rehabilitation services in Indonesia, detailing characteristics like staffing, session frequency, and duration, providing a baseline for service assessment.
items.curatedReason: 印度尼西亚卒中康复服务现状调查告诉你，资源匮乏地区的患者获不到规范化治疗——这提示你在推荐高强度或长疗程前，先问问患者真实的服务可及性。
items.titleZh: 印度尼西亚卒中康复服务的国家调查
items.summaryZh: 一项全国性调查描述了印度尼西亚的卒中康复服务情况，涵盖了人员配置、治疗频率和时长等。这为了解该国服务现状提供了基线信息，对识别服务缺口和倡导改进至关重要。
items.curatedReasonEn: This survey describes stroke rehabilitation services in Indonesia, covering staffing, frequency, and duration. It provides a baseline understanding of the service landscape, crucial for identifying gaps and advocating for improvements in a low-resource setting.

items.title: Core Stability Training for Post-Stroke Recovery: A Multifaceted Approach to Enhance Postural Control and Motor Function.
items.summary: This review explores core stability training (CST) as a multifaceted approach to improve postural control and motor function in stroke survivors, supporting its use in rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 核心稳定性训练对卒中患者姿态控制和运动功能有多维度益处，这个综述汇总了机制——但它是综述而非新RCT，你该问的是：跟传统平衡训练比，核心训练的增益量是多少？
items.titleZh: 核心稳定性训练对卒中后康复的益处：增强姿势控制与运动功能的多元化方法
items.summaryZh: 该综述探讨了核心稳定性训练 (CST) 在卒中康复中的应用，强调了其改善姿势控制和运动功能的多元机制。文章支持CST作为一项有价值的干预措施，但其本身为综述而非直接疗效研究。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review explores core stability training (CST) for post-stroke recovery, highlighting its multifaceted mechanisms for improving postural control and motor function. It supports CST as a valuable intervention, though it's a review and not a primary study on effectiveness.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Ischemic preconditioning alters gait mechanics in older adults with knee osteoarthritis.
items.summary: Ischemic preconditioning altered gait mechanics in older adults with knee osteoarthritis, suggesting a potential new intervention for improving walking patterns.
items.curatedReason: 缺血预处理改变了膝关节骨关节炎患者的步态模式，但这只是单次干预的结果——别当长期治疗方案用，需要后续研究证实能否持续改善。
items.titleZh: 缺血预处理改变膝骨关节炎老年患者的步态力学
items.summaryZh: 该研究发现，缺血预处理能改变膝骨关节炎 (OA) 老年患者的步态力学，提示其可能是一种除了单纯运动之外，改善行走模式的新型干预措施。但这是一次性研究，长期效果未知。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study found that ischemic preconditioning altered gait mechanics in older adults with knee osteoarthritis (OA), suggesting it might be a novel intervention to improve walking patterns beyond exercise alone. However, it's a single-session study, so long-term effects are unknown.

items.title: Effect of home-based rehabilitation in frail older adults after cardiac surgery: a prospective feasibility study.
items.summary: A feasibility study found a home-based multimodal exercise program (Vivifrail) feasible for frail older adults after cardiac surgery, showing potential for maintaining physical performance.
items.curatedReason: Vivifrail 居家多模式训练在心脏手术后衰弱老年人中可行，可作为维持功能的选项，但目前只是可行性证据——改变临床应用前必须有更大样本的效果对照。
items.titleZh: 居家康复对心脏手术后衰弱老年患者的效果：一项前瞻性可行性研究
items.summaryZh: 这项前瞻性可行性研究评估了一个针对心脏手术后衰弱老年患者的居家康复计划（Vivifrail）。研究认为该计划是可行的，为这个脆弱人群维持功能提供了一条潜在途径，但仍需更大规模试验来确认其有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective feasibility study evaluated a home-based rehabilitation program (Vivifrail) for frail older adults post-cardiac surgery. It found the program feasible, offering a potential pathway to maintain function in a vulnerable population, but requires larger trials to confirm effectiveness.

items.title: Influence of environmental barriers and facilitators on functioning: Analytical observational study in community-dwelling older adults.
items.summary: An observational study analyzed how environmental barriers and facilitators influence the functioning of community-dwelling older adults, highlighting the environment's role in healthy aging.
items.curatedReason: 环境障碍和便利设施对社区老年人功能的影响是真实存在的，你的康复计划里必须纳入环境评估，不能只关注患者本身。
items.titleZh: 环境障碍与促进因素对社区居住老年人功能的影响：一项分析性观察研究
items.summaryZh: 这项观察性研究分析了环境因素对社区居住老年人功能的影响，强调了在康复规划中考虑环境对促进参与和独立性的重要性。它为理解健康老龄化中的环境作用提供了定量依据。
items.curatedReasonEn: This observational study analyzes the influence of environmental factors on functioning in community-dwelling older adults. It reinforces the importance of considering the environment in rehabilitation planning to promote participation and independence.

items.title: From robustness to frailty: how post-COVID-19 frailty shapes dyspnea, fatigue, and physical and functional status in post-COVID-19 syndrome.
items.summary: A study on post-COVID-19 syndrome found that frailty significantly impacts dyspnea, fatigue, and physical function, highlighting the need for frailty assessment in managing PCS patients.
items.curatedReason: 长新冠患者中衰弱程度直接影响呼吸困难、疲劳和躯体功能，评估衰弱不是可选项——应该成为长新冠患者管理的必做项目。
items.titleZh: 从稳健到衰弱：后COVID-19衰弱如何影响后COVID-19综合征中的呼吸困难、疲劳及身体与功能状态
items.summaryZh: 一项关于后COVID-19综合征 (PCS) 的研究发现，衰弱显著影响呼吸困难、疲劳及身体功能，表明衰弱是影响PCS患者恢复轨迹的关键因素。这强调了在管理PCS患者时进行衰弱评估的重要性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study examines the relationship between frailty and symptoms (dyspnea, fatigue, physical function) in post-COVID-19 syndrome (PCS). It indicates that frailty is a key factor influencing recovery trajectory in PCS patients, suggesting frailty assessment is crucial.

items.title: Evolving Demographics and Injury Characteristics of US Traumatic Spinal Cord Injury, 1972-2024.
items.summary: An analysis of US traumatic spinal cord injury data from 1972-2024 reveals evolving demographics and injury characteristics, providing historical context for trends.
items.curatedReason: 美国脊髓损伤流行病学数据库（1972-2024）显示人口学和损伤特征的演变趋势，为制定公共卫生干预策略提供了时间序列证据。
items.titleZh: 美国创伤性脊髓损伤的人口统计学与损伤特征演变，1972-2024年
items.summaryZh: 对美国1972-2024年创伤性脊髓损伤 (tSCI) 数据的分析，追踪了人口统计学和损伤特征的演变。这为理解该领域趋势提供了宝贵的历史背景，有助于公共卫生倡议。
items.curatedReasonEn: This analysis of a longitudinal database (1972-2024) tracks evolving demographics and injury characteristics of US traumatic spinal cord injury (tSCI) cases. It provides valuable historical context for understanding trends and informing public health initiatives.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: Phenomenological exploration of perceptions, experiences, facilitators, and inhibitors in patients with knee osteoarthritis during physiotherapy rehabilitation in a low- and middle-income country.
items.summary: A qualitative study in a low- and middle-income country explored patient perceptions, facilitators, and barriers to physiotherapy rehabilitation for knee osteoarthritis, highlighting context-specific factors.
items.curatedReason: 低中收入国家的定性研究揭示了当地患者对膝关节骨关节炎康复的真实认知和障碍，但结果不能直接套用到你的临床环境——需要本地化的定量验证。
items.titleZh: 低中收入国家膝骨关节炎患者物理治疗康复的认知、体验、促进因素及抑制因素的现象学研究
items.summaryZh: 一项在中低收入国家进行的定性研究，探讨了膝骨关节炎患者对物理治疗的认知、体验以及康复的促进与阻碍因素，突显了特定背景下的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study from a low- and middle-income country explores patient perceptions of physiotherapy rehabilitation for knee osteoarthritis. While providing valuable context on facilitators and inhibitors, it's qualitative and context-specific, limiting broad applicability without further quantitative data.

items.title: Randomised three-armed trial investigation of the Copenhagen Achilles tendon Rupture Treatment Algorithm (CARTA) for individualised treatment of acute Achilles tendon rupture
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial is investigating whether an individualized treatment algorithm (CARTA) for acute Achilles tendon rupture is superior to default operative or non-operative strategies.
items.curatedReason: CARTA 算法如果优于标准术式/非手术治疗，标志着跟腱断裂从一刀切向个体化决策转变——但现在还在验证阶段，结果出来前别改临床路径。
items.titleZh: 随机三臂试验调查Copenhagen跟腱断裂治疗算法（CARTA）在急性跟腱断裂个体化治疗中的应用
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验正在评估，针对急性跟腱断裂的个体化治疗算法（CARTA）是否优于默认的手术或非手术策略，旨在优化该损伤的治疗效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT compares an individualized treatment algorithm (CARTA) for Achilles tendon rupture against standard operative/non-operative care. If CARTA proves superior, it signifies a shift towards personalized rehabilitation strategies, optimizing outcomes for this common injury.

items.title: Long-term resistance training with all-cause and cause-specific mortality: assessing dose-response and joint associations with aerobic physical activity
items.summary: A study assessing resistance training's association with all-cause and cause-specific mortality found dose-response relationships and joint effects with aerobic activity, supporting its role in longevity.
items.curatedReason: 阻力训练与全因死亡率呈剂量反应关系，与有氧运动有协同效应，这是足够强的证据来强化患者进行阻力训练——别再把它当成次要选项。
items.titleZh: 长期抗阻训练与全因及特定原因死亡率：评估剂量反应关系及与有氧活动的联合效应
items.summaryZh: 这项研究评估了长期抗阻训练与全因及特定原因死亡率的关系，发现了剂量反应关系以及与有氧活动的联合效应，有力支持将抗阻训练纳入健康指南以促进长寿。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study examines long-term mortality risk associated with resistance training, including dose-response and joint effects with aerobic activity. It strongly supports integrating resistance training into public health recommendations for longevity and warrants emphasizing its role alongside aerobic exercise.

items.title: Sit-to-stand test emerges as a powerful prognostic factor of future health outcomes: different versions, measurement properties and future perspectives
items.summary: A review concludes that the Sit-to-Stand test is a strong prognostic indicator of future health outcomes across different age groups, highlighting its utility in assessing muscular strength.
items.curatedReason: 坐站测试跨年龄组都能有效预测健康风险，其简便性和测量学特性使它成为功能强度评估和预测不良结局的一线工具。
items.titleZh: 坐站测试成为未来健康结局的有力预测因子：不同版本、测量特性与未来展望
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述指出，坐站测试（Sit-to-Stand test）是评估未来健康结局（包括全因死亡率）的有力预测因子，其简便性使其成为临床评估功能性力量和预测健康风险的宝贵工具。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review highlights the Sit-to-Stand test as a powerful prognostic factor for health outcomes across age groups. Its simplicity and established measurement properties make it a valuable clinical tool for assessing functional strength and predicting future health risks.

items.title: Multimodal symptom-targeted treatment for young people with persisting post-concussion symptoms: a randomised clinical trial
items.summary: A randomized clinical trial assessed the effectiveness of 'Concussion Essentials,' a multidisciplinary, symptom-targeted treatment for persisting post-concussion symptoms (PPCS) in adolescents.
items.curatedReason: 症状靶向的多学科协作干预（Concussion Essentials）在青少年持续性脑震荡后症状中有效，说明整合治疗模式比单纯保守管理更强——但这个结论还需在更广泛人群验证。
items.titleZh: 针对持续性脑震荡后症状的 the Concussion Essentials（CE）多模式症状靶向治疗：一项随机临床试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机临床试验评估了‘Concussion Essentials’（CE）——一种针对青少年持续性脑震荡后症状（PPCS）的多模式、症状靶向治疗——的有效性，为复杂脑震荡后遗症的治疗提供了新思路。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT evaluates a symptom-targeted, multidisciplinary approach (Concussion Essentials) for persisting post-concussion symptoms (PPCS) in adolescents. Positive results would support integrated care models for this complex condition, offering hope for improved outcomes beyond standard conservative management.

items.title: Long-term risk of knee replacement after ACL reconstruction using the contralateral knee as an internal control: a National Hospital Episode Statistics database study of 135 881 patients
items.summary: A large database study using the contralateral knee as an internal control estimated the long-term risk of knee replacement following ACL reconstruction in 135,881 patients.
items.curatedReason: 13.5 万例患者的数据库研究用健侧膝作对照，揭示 ACL 重建远期膝关节置换风险——这直接影响你对患者的长期预后交代和手术决策，不只是当下恢复。
items.titleZh: 以前交叉韧带重建术后对侧膝关节为内部对照的远期全膝关节置换风险：一项135,881名患者的英国国家医院病历统计数据库研究
items.summaryZh: 一项利用对侧膝关节作为内部对照的大型数据库研究，评估了135,881名患者在前交叉韧带重建术（ACLr）后远期发生全膝关节置换的风险，为理解ACLr的长期效果和关节健康提供了重要证据。
items.curatedReasonEn: This large database study uses the contralateral knee as a control to estimate long-term knee replacement risk after ACL reconstruction. The findings provide crucial evidence on the durability of ACLr outcomes and potential long-term joint health implications, informing patient counseling and surgical decision-making.

items.title: Effectiveness of maintenance interventions promoting physical activity following exercise therapy for chronic conditions: an umbrella review
items.summary: An umbrella review investigated the effectiveness of maintenance interventions following exercise therapy for chronic conditions on physical activity, function, and quality of life.
items.curatedReason: 运动治疗后怎么维持效果是真问题，这份伞状综述告诉你维持性干预的证据如何；别设计了好的运动方案却不管患者长期依从，效果白瞎。
items.titleZh: 运动疗法后促进体力活动的维持性干预效果：一项伞形综述
items.summaryZh: 这项伞形综述旨在评估运动疗法后维持性干预措施，在改善慢性病患者体力活动、身体功能、健康相关生活质量等方面的效果，为制定长期运动管理策略提供依据。
items.curatedReasonEn: This umbrella review synthesizes evidence on maintenance interventions post-exercise therapy for chronic conditions. It's crucial for understanding how to ensure long-term adherence and sustained benefits from exercise interventions, informing practice regarding relapse prevention and long-term management strategies.

items.title: Rehabilitation Utilizing Blood Flow Restriction Following Surgical Repair of a Bankart Lesion with a Buford Complex in an Elite High School Football Player: A Case Report.
items.summary: A case report describes the use of blood flow restriction in the rehabilitation of an elite high school football player following surgical repair of a Bankart lesion with a Buford complex.
items.curatedReason: 高水平运动员的 Bankart 损伤合并 Buford 复合体做血流限制训练能成功回归，提示这个手段在复杂肩关节不稳定情况下有用；但个案不代表通用，谨慎推广。
items.titleZh: 精英高中橄榄球运动员Bankart病灶合并Buford复合体修复术后使用血流限制性康复的病例报告
items.summaryZh: 本病例报告描述了一名精英高中橄榄球运动员在接受Bankart病灶合并Buford复合体修复术后，采用血流限制性康复的治疗过程，为处理此类复杂肩关节不稳病例提供了参考。
items.curatedReasonEn: This case report details a unique rehab approach using blood flow restriction for an elite athlete with a Bankart lesion and Buford complex. While not generalizable, it offers insights for complex shoulder instability cases, especially in collision athletes, and highlights the potential role of BFR in these challenging scenarios.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Early Neuromuscular and Co-activation Patterns After Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction In Males: A Case-control Exploratory Feasibility Study.
items.summary: An exploratory feasibility study investigated early neuromuscular and co-activation patterns after ACL reconstruction, identifying excessive hamstring co-activation as a potential barrier to quadriceps recovery.
items.curatedReason: ACL术后前两周的过度腘绳肌共收缩会直接阻碍股四头肌恢复——识别这一模式后你需要主动抑制它，而不是放任代偿发展成慢性问题。
items.titleZh: 男性前交叉韧带重建术后早期神经肌肉和协同激活模式：一项探索性可行性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项探索性可行性研究调查了男性前交叉韧带重建术后（ACLr）早期神经肌肉和协同激活模式，发现早期过度腘绳肌协同激活可能阻碍股四头肌恢复，为早期干预策略的制定提供了依据。
items.curatedReasonEn: This feasibility study examines early neuromuscular and co-activation patterns after ACL reconstruction. Identifying excessive hamstring co-activation within the first two weeks is crucial for understanding barriers to quadriceps recovery and could guide early intervention strategies to prevent long-term compensation.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Mandatory genetic testing in sport: World Athletics and World Boxing repeat the discredited mistakes of the past
items.summary: This article criticizes mandatory SRY gene testing for female athletes in World Athletics and World Boxing, arguing it repeats discredited mistakes and raises ethical concerns.
items.curatedReason: 强制SRY基因检测在科学和伦理上都站不住脚，重复了已被否定的历史错误——别被这类政策迷惑，它对临床决策没有正当性。
items.titleZh: 运动中的强制性基因检测：世界田联和世界拳击再次犯下过去的错误
items.summaryZh: 本文批评了世界田联和世界拳击强制女性运动员进行SRY基因检测的政策，认为这是重蹈覆辙，并引发了关于运动中性别验证的伦理和科学争议。
items.curatedReasonEn: This article critiques mandatory SRY gene testing for female athletes in athletics and boxing, calling it a repeat of discredited past mistakes. It raises crucial ethical and scientific questions about sex verification in sport, prompting critical evaluation of such policies.

items.title: SRY gene screening in elite Athletics: rationale, science and implementation of the World Athletics Regulations
items.summary: This article details the rationale, science, and implementation of World Athletics' regulations requiring SRY gene screening for female athletes to compete in the female category.
items.curatedReason: 这是官方支持SRY检测的论述，用来理解第31条的对立观点，但其科学依据本身存在争议，不应作为你性别验证决策的主要根据。
items.titleZh: 精英田径中的SRY基因筛查：世界田联规定的基本原理、科学依据与实施
items.summaryZh: 本文阐述了世界田联关于要求女性运动员进行SRY基因筛查以证明其有资格参加女子组比赛的规定的基本原理、科学依据及其实施细节，提供了该争议政策的官方解释。
items.curatedReasonEn: This article explains the rationale, science, and implementation of World Athletics' SRY gene screening regulations for the female category. It provides the official perspective on this controversial policy, essential for understanding the background of the debate discussed in index 31.

items.title: Goal attainment scaling for patients with chronic low back pain receiving physical therapist care: a feasibility and reliability study.
items.summary: A feasibility and reliability study investigated the use of Goal Attainment Scaling (GAS) for patients with chronic low back pain, finding it a potentially meaningful way to capture individual patient goals.
items.curatedReason: GAS比标准量表更能捕捉慢性腰痛患者的个体目标，直接提升患者参与度和治疗契合度——纳入你的评估工具箱，尤其是长疗程患者。
items.titleZh: 慢性低腰痛患者接受物理治疗时目标达成量表的可行性与可靠性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项可行性与可靠性研究考察了慢性低腰痛患者使用目标达成量表（GAS）的情况，发现GAS能更具意义地捕捉患者的个体化目标，有望提升患者参与度和干预的针对性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This feasibility study explores Goal Attainment Scaling (GAS) for chronic low back pain, suggesting it can capture patient-centered goals better than traditional measures. For you, this means GAS could be a valuable tool to enhance patient engagement and tailor interventions, though further reliability studies are needed for broader clinical adoption.

items.title: Exploring psychological flexibility processes in adults with spinal cord injury: a qualitative study.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored the lived experiences of psychological flexibility processes in adults with spinal cord injury (SCI), highlighting how individuals engage in values-based action despite internal difficulties.
items.curatedReason: 脊髓损伤患者的心理灵活性不是单靠认知训练就能改善的，而是需要在值观驱动的行动中获得——这改变了你对该人群心理干预的核心策略。
items.titleZh: 探索脊髓损伤成人患者的心理灵活性过程：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究深入探讨了脊髓损伤（SCI）成人患者的心理灵活性过程，揭示了患者如何在面对内在困难时仍能采取基于价值观的行动，为 SCI 患者的心理健康和康复提供了更以患者为中心的视角。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study explores psychological flexibility processes in adults with spinal cord injury (SCI). It offers rich insights into how individuals navigate challenges while pursuing values-driven actions, informing more patient-centered approaches to mental health and rehabilitation in this population.

items.title: Understanding Extreme Injustice Appraisal Phenotypes in Newly Acquired Spinal Cord Injury.
items.summary: A cross-sectional analysis identified extreme injustice appraisal phenotypes in individuals with recent spinal cord injury (SCI), aiming to enhance psychosocial interventions and future research.
items.curatedReason: This study identifies 'extreme injustice appraisal' phenotypes in recent SCI patients, aiming to improve psychosocial interventions. Understanding these specific appraisals can help clinicians tailor psychological support more effectively, moving beyond general coping strategies.
items.titleZh: 理解新发脊髓损伤患者的极端不公正评价表型
items.summaryZh: 一项横断面分析确定了新发脊髓损伤（SCI）患者的极端不公正评价表型，旨在改进心理社会干预和未来的临床研究。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study identifies 'extreme injustice appraisal' phenotypes in recent SCI patients, aiming to improve psychosocial interventions. Understanding these specific appraisals can help clinicians tailor psychological support more effectively, moving beyond general coping strategies.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: Cardiac care of athletes with disabilities: are we prepared to adapt?
items.summary: An article discusses the increasing participation of athletes with disabilities in sports and questions the preparedness of cardiac care systems to adapt to their specific needs.
items.curatedReason: 残障运动员参赛人数在增加，但你们的心内科防线还没准备好——趁现在补课，别等出事。
items.titleZh: 残疾运动员的心脏护理：我们准备好适应了吗？
items.summaryZh: 本文探讨了残疾运动员日益增多的参与度，并质疑了现有心脏护理系统是否能有效适应他们的特殊需求，呼吁关注这一群体。
items.curatedReasonEn: This article questions the preparedness of cardiac care for athletes with disabilities, noting increased participation. It highlights a gap in the literature and practice, prompting clinicians to consider the unique needs of this growing athletic population.

items.title: Make or break: psychotropic medications have off-label effects on neuromuscular performance
items.summary: An article discusses the off-label effects of psychotropic medications on athletes' neuromuscular performance, emphasizing the need to consider these impacts on mental health and physical capabilities.
items.curatedReason: 精神类用药会改变运动员的神经肌肉表现，不能只看心理效果而忽视训练侧效应——用药前得问清这个代价。
items.titleZh: “决定成败”：精神活性药物对神经肌肉表现的非标签效应
items.summaryZh: 本文探讨了精神活性药物对运动员神经肌肉表现的非标签效应，强调了在管理运动员时考虑这些药物对心理健康和身体能力的影响的重要性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This article discusses the off-label use of psychotropic medications for athletes' mental health and neuromuscular performance. It highlights the importance of considering these effects when managing athletes, especially regarding performance enhancement or side effects impacting training.

items.title: Australasian College of Sport and Exercise Physicians edition: uncertainty in sport and exercise medicine
items.summary: An editorial from the Australasian College of Sport and Exercise Physicians (ACSEP) addresses the theme of uncertainty in sport and exercise medicine, relevant for their upcoming conference.
items.curatedReason: 澳新运动医学要承认不确定性是常态，而不是失败——这个心态对你的临床决策框架有实际约束力，尤其边界病例。
items.titleZh: 澳洲运动与体育医师学院特刊：运动与体育医学中的不确定性
items.summaryZh: 这篇来自澳洲运动与体育医师学院（ACSEP）的社论，围绕其即将举行的年会主题——运动与体育医学中的不确定性——展开讨论，反映了该领域在不断变化的医疗和体育环境中的挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial from the Australasian College of Sport and Exercise Physicians (ACSEP) discusses navigating uncertainty in sport and exercise medicine. It sets a theme for their upcoming conference and acknowledges the dynamic nature of the field, relevant for practitioners in Australia and NZ.

items.title: How do people with multiple sclerosis who have walking difficulties perceive participation? A qualitative analysis.
items.summary: A qualitative analysis exploring how people with multiple sclerosis and walking difficulties perceive participation, highlighting the subjective aspects of this rehabilitation concept.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究深入探讨了多发性硬化症（MS）步态障碍患者对“参与”的看法。这有助于你超越 ICF 框架的局限，更真实地理解 MS 患者的核心康复需求，从而设计更贴近患者主观体验的干预措施。
items.titleZh: 步态困难的多发性硬化症患者如何看待参与？一项定性分析
items.summaryZh: 一项定性分析探讨了有步态困难的多发性硬化症患者如何看待“参与”这一康复概念，突出了其主观感知。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study delves into the perceptions of 'participation' among people with multiple sclerosis (MS) who have walking difficulties. It helps you understand MS patients' core rehabilitation needs beyond the ICF framework, enabling you to design interventions closer to patients' subjective experiences.

items.title: Sport-related trauma and motor neurone disease: a scoping review of epidemiology, mechanisms and future directions
items.summary: A scoping review mapped existing epidemiological evidence on the relationship between sport-related trauma and Motor Neurone Disease/Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis (MND/ALS), identifying potential mechanistic pathways and research gaps.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述探讨了运动相关创伤与运动神经元疾病（MND/ALS）之间的关系。虽然机制尚不明确，但它提醒你在高强度、高碰撞运动中，需对头部和脊柱创伤进行更严格的风险管理和随访，尤其对有家族史的个体。
items.titleZh: 运动相关创伤与运动神经元疾病：流行病学、机制及未来方向的范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述梳理了运动相关创伤与运动神经元疾病/肌萎缩侧索硬化症（MND/ALS）之间关系的现有流行病学证据，识别了潜在的机制途径和研究空白。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review explores the relationship between sport-related trauma and motor neuron disease (MND/ALS). While the mechanisms are unclear, it reminds you to implement stricter risk management and follow-up for head and spine trauma in high-intensity, contact sports, especially for individuals with a family history.

items.title: Retraction Note: The effectiveness of routine physiotherapy with and without neuromobilization on pain and functional disability in patients with shoulder impingement syndrome; a randomized control clinical trial.
items.summary: Retraction notice for a randomized controlled clinical trial on the effectiveness of routine physiotherapy with and without neuromobilization on pain and functional disability in patients with shoulder impingement syndrome.
items.curatedReason: 这是一篇撤稿声明，原论文关于肩峰撞击综合征物理治疗与神经松动术效果的随机对照试验已被撤回。这意味着你不能再引用该研究的结论，提醒你在查阅文献时留意撤稿信息。
items.titleZh: 撤稿声明：常规物理治疗结合或不结合神经松动术对肩峰撞击综合征患者疼痛和功能障碍的疗效；一项随机对照临床试验
items.summaryZh: 一篇关于常规物理治疗结合或不结合神经松动术对肩峰撞击综合征患者疼痛和功能障碍疗效的随机对照临床试验已撤稿。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is a retraction notice for a randomized controlled trial on the effectiveness of routine physiotherapy with and without neuromobilization for shoulder impingement syndrome. This means you cannot cite its conclusions and should be aware of retraction information when reviewing literature.

items.title: Functional stratification reveals speed-independent gait impairments beyond chronological age.
items.summary: This study examined whether stratifying older adults by functional status using the Short Physical Performance Battery (SPPB) could reveal speed-independent gait impairments beyond chronological age, using kinematic profiling.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究表明，通过功能分层（如 SPPB）来评估老年人步态障碍，能够发现独立于年龄的速度无关性功能损害。这意味着在老年康复中，你应超越单纯的计时测试，更深入地评估步态生物力学，以早期识别并干预功能衰退。
items.titleZh: 功能分层揭示了独立于年龄的速度无关性步态障碍
items.summaryZh: 这项研究旨在通过运动学分析，探讨根据短期身体表现量表（SPPB）将老年人进行功能分层，能否揭示独立于年龄的速度无关性步态障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study indicates that functional stratification (e.g., using SPPB) for gait impairment in older adults can reveal speed-independent functional deficits beyond chronological age. This means in geriatric rehabilitation, you should move beyond simple timed tests and delve deeper into gait biomechanics to identify and intervene in functional decline earlier.

items.title: School-based Motor Skill Interventions for Children and Adolescents with Developmental Coordination Disorder: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis investigated the effects of school-based interventions on motor performance in children and adolescents with developmental coordination disorder.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和 Meta 分析证实了学校体育技能干预对发育性协调障碍儿童和青少年运动表现的有效性。这意味着你在儿童康复中，可以更有信心地与学校合作，推广基于学校的干预方案。
items.titleZh: 针对发育性协调障碍儿童和青少年的学校体育技能干预：一项系统综述和 Meta 分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和 Meta 分析调查了学校体育技能干预对发育性协调障碍儿童和青少年运动表现的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis confirms the effectiveness of school-based motor skill interventions for improving motor performance in children and adolescents with developmental coordination disorder. This means you can collaborate with schools with greater confidence in pediatric rehabilitation to promote school-based intervention programs.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Characteristics and reasons for non-attendance at exercise therapy and self-management support among patients with multimorbidity. An exploratory cross-sectional study from the MOBILIZE trial
items.summary: An exploratory cross-sectional study from the MOBILIZE trial investigated characteristics and reasons for non-attendance at exercise therapy and self-management support among patients with multimorbidity.
items.curatedReason: 对多重共病患者运动疗法和自我管理支持的依从性进行探索性研究。如果你在管理多重共病患者时遇到依从性问题，这份研究为你提供了理解非依从性原因的视角，从而更好地调整干预策略。
items.titleZh: 多重共病患者运动疗法和自我管理支持依从性的特征与原因：一项 MOBILIZE 试验的探索性横断面研究
items.summaryZh: MOBILIZE 试验的一项探索性横断面研究调查了多重共病患者未能参与运动疗法和自我管理支持的特征及原因。
items.curatedReasonEn: This exploratory study investigates adherence to exercise therapy and self-management support among multimorbidity patients. If you encounter adherence issues with multimorbidity patients, this research offers insights into reasons for non-adherence, helping you better adjust intervention strategies.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Reducing Recidivism After Traumatic Brain Injury: Results from the Reentry Continuum for Brain Injury (RCBI) Trial
items.summary: The Reentry Continuum for Brain Injury (RCBI) trial examined the effects of an intervention designed to support individuals with traumatic brain injury pending release from prison, focusing on recidivism and behavioral outcomes.
items.curatedReason: RCBI 试验旨在减少 TBI 患者出狱后的再犯率，如果结果积极，这可能意味着你需要在脑损伤康复中，更早地介入社会融入和行为干预，以帮助患者成功重返社会，降低再犯风险。
items.titleZh: 减少创伤性脑损伤后的再犯：脑损伤再融入连续体（RCBI）试验的结果
items.summaryZh: 脑损伤再融入连续体（RCBI）试验旨在检验一项旨在支持创伤性脑损伤患者出狱的干预措施的效果，重点关注再犯率和行为结果。
items.curatedReasonEn: The RCBI trial aims to reduce recidivism rates for TBI patients post-release. If successful, this could imply that you need to intervene earlier with social integration and behavioral interventions in brain injury rehabilitation to help patients successfully re-enter society and reduce re-offense risks.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Development of an Open-Access Action Observation Video Library for Upper Limb Motor Rehabilitation
items.summary: This study reports the development and validation of an open-access action observation video library for upper limb motor rehabilitation, addressing the limited availability of such resources for occupational therapists treating stroke survivors.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究开发了一个开放获取的动作观察视频库，旨在促进中风患者上肢运动康复。如果你在临床中使用动作观察疗法，这个资源可以有效弥补现有视频材料的不足，提高干预的可及性和标准化。
items.titleZh: 开发用于上肢运动康复的开放获取动作观察视频库
items.summaryZh: 本研究报告了用于上肢运动康复的开放获取动作观察视频库的开发和验证，以解决职业治疗师在治疗中风幸存者时此类资源有限的问题。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study developed an open-access action observation video library to facilitate upper limb motor rehabilitation for stroke survivors. If you use action observation therapy in your clinical practice, this resource can effectively address the scarcity of existing video materials, improving the accessibility and standardization of interventions.

items.title: Sensorimotor recovery and neuropathic pain reduction after remotely delivered cognitive multisensory rehabilitation or remotely delivered exercise in adults with spinal cord injury: a pilot clinical trial.
items.summary: A pilot clinical trial explored the effects of remotely delivered cognitive multisensory rehabilitation or remotely delivered exercise on sensorimotor recovery and neuropathic pain reduction in adults with spinal cord injury, aiming to address deficits in mental body representations.
items.curatedReason: 这项初步临床试验发现远程认知多感官康复或远程运动干预可改善脊髓损伤患者的感觉运动恢复和神经性疼痛。这意味着你可以在远程康复中考虑这两种方法，为脊髓损伤患者提供更灵活和可及的治疗选择，尤其对于那些受限于出行或地理位置的患者。
items.titleZh: 远程认知多感官康复或远程运动干预对脊髓损伤成人感觉运动恢复和神经性疼痛减轻的影响：一项初步临床试验。
items.summaryZh: 一项初步临床试验探讨了远程认知多感官康复或远程运动干预对脊髓损伤成人感觉运动恢复和神经性疼痛减轻的影响，旨在解决心理身体表征方面的缺陷。
items.curatedReasonEn: This pilot clinical trial found that remotely delivered cognitive multisensory rehabilitation or remotely delivered exercise can improve sensorimotor recovery and neuropathic pain in individuals with spinal cord injury. This means you can consider these two approaches in telerehabilitation, offering more flexible and accessible treatment options for SCI patients, especially those with mobility or geographical constraints.

items.title: Profiles of Quality of Life Outcomes Observed in Rehabilitation Patients Using Latent Profile Analysis
items.summary: This study used latent profile analysis to explore common patterns of quality of life outcomes in diverse rehabilitation patients, aiming to understand shared experiences across diagnostic groupings.
items.curatedReason: 本研究利用潜在剖面分析，识别了康复患者中生活质量结果的共同模式。这提醒你在临床实践中，应超越单一诊断，识别不同患者群体共享的生活质量特征，从而提供更个性化的康复支持。
items.titleZh: 利用潜在剖面分析观察康复患者生活质量结果的剖面
items.summaryZh: 本研究利用潜在剖面分析探索了不同康复患者群体中生活质量结果的常见模式，旨在理解跨诊断组别的共同体验。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study used latent profile analysis to identify common patterns of quality of life outcomes in rehabilitation patients. This reminds you to look beyond single diagnoses in clinical practice and identify shared quality of life characteristics across different patient groups, allowing for more personalized rehabilitation support.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Impact of Sociodemographic Variables on Physical Therapist’s Documentation of Physical Activity Levels
items.summary: This study examined how physical therapists document physical activity levels and how sociodemographic variables impact this documentation.
items.curatedReason: 本研究审视了物理治疗师记录身体活动水平的方式及其受社会人口学变量的影响。这提示你在临床实践中，需要更标准化地记录患者的身体活动数据，并警惕潜在的偏见，确保评估的全面性和公平性。
items.titleZh: 社会人口学变量对物理治疗师记录身体活动水平的影响
items.summaryZh: 本研究考察了社会人口学变量如何影响物理治疗师记录身体活动水平的方式。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study examines how physical therapists document physical activity levels and the impact of sociodemographic variables. This suggests that in clinical practice, you need to standardize the recording of patient physical activity data and be aware of potential biases to ensure comprehensive and equitable assessment.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Letter to the editor: Pain Catastrophization and Fear of Movement Are Potential Moderators for Response to Treatment in Women With Fibromyalgia: Secondary Analyses of Randomized Controlled Trial
items.summary: A letter to the editor raises serious statistical flaws and concerns about the reliability and validity of results from a secondary analysis of a randomized controlled trial in women with fibromyalgia.
items.curatedReason: 这封致编辑的信函对之前一项纤维肌痛 RCT 的统计缺陷提出了严重质疑。如果你参考过该研究的结论，请重新审视其可靠性，并结合其他高质量证据进行临床决策。
items.titleZh: 致编辑的信：疼痛灾难化和运动恐惧是纤维肌痛女性治疗反应的潜在调节因素：随机对照试验的二次分析
items.summaryZh: 一封致编辑的信函指出，一项针对纤维肌痛女性随机对照试验的二次分析存在严重的统计缺陷，对其结果的可靠性和有效性提出质疑。
items.curatedReasonEn: This letter to the editor raises serious concerns about statistical flaws in a previous fibromyalgia RCT. If you have relied on the conclusions of that study, please re-evaluate its reliability and make clinical decisions based on other high-quality evidence.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Profiles of Quality of Life Outcomes Observed in Rehabilitation Patients Using Latent Profile Analysis.
items.summary: Latent profile analysis identified distinct patterns of quality of life outcomes in a diverse group of rehabilitation patients, including those with traumatic brain injury and spinal cord injury.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究通过潜在类别分析识别了不同康复患者群体中生活质量结局的共同模式。这提示你可以在制定治疗计划时，根据患者特定的生活质量特征，进行更精准的康复干预，而不仅仅是诊断。
items.titleZh: 康复患者生活质量结局模式的潜在类别分析
items.summaryZh: 潜在类别分析在一组多元康复患者（包括创伤性脑损伤和脊髓损伤患者）中识别出了不同的生活质量结局模式。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study identified common patterns in quality of life outcomes across diverse rehabilitation patient groups using latent profile analysis. This suggests that when developing treatment plans, you can implement more precise rehabilitation interventions based on patients' specific quality of life characteristics, rather than solely on diagnosis.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Profiles of Quality of Life Outcomes Observed in Rehabilitation Patients Using Latent Profile Analysis

items.title: Warm-up is not a workout: a principles-based critique of continued efforts to use warm-up programmes for ACL injury prevention
items.summary: A critique argues against the continued efforts to use warm-up programs for ACL injury prevention, emphasizing the distinction between warm-up and workout in terms of efficacy versus effectiveness.
items.curatedReason: 这篇文章明确指出热身并非训练，并对将热身计划用于 ACL 损伤预防的持续努力提出了批判。你应区分热身与训练的目的，并认识到虽然热身有益，但不能替代全面的损伤预防训练计划。
items.titleZh: 热身并非训练：对持续将热身计划用于 ACL 损伤预防的原则性批判
items.summaryZh: 一篇评论文章批判了将热身计划持续用于 ACL（前交叉韧带）损伤预防的做法，强调了热身与训练在功效和效果之间存在区别。
items.curatedReasonEn: This article explicitly states that warm-up is not a workout and critiques ongoing efforts to use warm-up programs for ACL injury prevention. You should distinguish the purpose of warm-up from training and recognize that while warm-ups are beneficial, they are not a substitute for comprehensive injury prevention training programs.

items.title: PhysiCase: Development and dual-layer validation of synthetic cases for health professional education: A pilot study leveraging Generative AI
items.summary: The PhysiCase project developed and dual-layer validated synthetic cases for health professional education using Generative AI, addressing privacy and ethical barriers associated with real-world clinical records.
items.curatedReason: PhysiCase 项目利用生成式 AI 开发和验证合成病例，这在健康专业教育中具有重要意义。这意味着 AI 生成的临床病例有望克服真实病例的隐私和伦理障碍，为你提供高质量的训练材料，并推动 AI 在教育中的应用。
items.titleZh: PhysiCase：利用生成式 AI 开发和双层验证用于健康专业教育的合成病例：一项试点研究
items.summaryZh: PhysiCase 项目利用生成式 AI 开发并双层验证了用于健康专业教育的合成病例，解决了真实临床记录相关的隐私和伦理障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: The PhysiCase project, utilizing generative AI for developing and validating synthetic cases, holds significant importance in health professional education. This means AI-generated clinical cases could overcome privacy and ethical barriers of real cases, providing you with high-quality training materials and advancing AI application in education.

items.title: Thriving in Motion: a community-based therapeutic physical literacy programme for children experiencing barriers to being active
items.summary: “Thriving in Motion” is a community-based therapeutic physical literacy program designed to engage children experiencing medical, behavioral, and/or social barriers to regular physical activity.
items.curatedReason: “Thriving in Motion”项目为那些面临活动障碍的儿童提供了一个社区导向的治疗性体育素养计划。你可以借鉴其模式，为有医疗、行为或社会挑战的儿童提供量身定制的运动服务，提高他们的身体活动水平和整体健康。
items.titleZh: “Thriving in Motion”：一项为面临活动障碍儿童设计的社区治疗性体育素养计划
items.summaryZh: “Thriving in Motion”是一个社区导向的治疗性体育素养项目，旨在帮助那些因医疗、行为或社会原因而难以参与常规体育活动的儿童。
items.curatedReasonEn: The "Thriving in Motion" program offers a community-based therapeutic physical literacy program for children facing barriers to being active. You can learn from its model to provide tailored exercise services for children with medical, behavioral, and/or social challenges, improving their physical activity levels and overall well-being.

items.title: Advancing the management of patellar tendinopathy (PhD Academy Award)
items.summary: A PhD study focused on improving patellar tendinopathy management through patient education and understanding of treatment response, evaluating AI chatbot reliability and long-term prognosis of exercise therapy.
items.curatedReason: 这项博士研究旨在通过改进患者教育和理解治疗反应来提升髌骨肌腱病的管理。你应该关注 AI 聊天机器人在提供健康信息方面的可靠性，以及运动疗法对髌骨肌腱病的长期预后数据，以优化你的临床实践。
items.titleZh: 髌骨肌腱病管理的进展（博士学院奖）
items.summaryZh: 一项博士研究旨在通过改进患者教育和对治疗反应的理解来提升髌骨肌腱病管理，同时评估了 AI 聊天机器人的可靠性以及运动疗法在长期预后中的作用。
