items.curatedReasonEn: This PhD research aims to advance patellar tendinopathy management by improving patient education and understanding of treatment response. You should pay attention to the reliability of AI chatbots for health information and long-term prognosis data for exercise therapy in patellar tendinopathy to optimize your clinical practice.

items.title: Cortical activity during narrative discourse production in individuals with post-stroke aphasia and controls measured via functional near-infrared spectroscopy
items.summary: This study used functional near-infrared spectroscopy (fNIRS) to measure cortical activity during narrative discourse production in individuals with post-stroke aphasia and controls, providing insights into language impairment.
items.curatedReason: 这项 fNIRS 研究提供了中风后失语症患者叙事话语皮层活动的新见解。虽然它不直接改变你的临床干预，但有助于深化对失语症神经机制的理解，可能会为未来的康复策略提供理论基础。
items.titleZh: 中风后失语症患者与对照组叙事话语产生过程中的皮层活动，通过功能性近红外光谱测量
items.summaryZh: 这项研究利用功能性近红外光谱（fNIRS）测量了中风后失语症患者和对照组在叙事话语产生过程中的皮层活动，从而深入了解语言障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: This fNIRS study provides new insights into cortical activity during narrative discourse production in individuals with post-stroke aphasia. While it doesn't directly alter your clinical interventions, it contributes to a deeper understanding of the neural mechanisms of aphasia, potentially informing future rehabilitation strategies.

items.title: Thoracic Manipulation versus Myofascial Release on Pain, Function, and Proprioception in Patients with Shoulder Impingement Syndrome: A Randomized Controlled Trial. - ScienceDirect
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial investigated the effects of thoracic manipulation versus myofascial release on pain, function, and proprioception in patients with shoulder impingement syndrome.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验比较了胸椎手法和筋膜放松对肩峰撞击综合征疼痛、功能和本体感觉的影响。如果你在临床中处理这类患者，这篇研究为你选择手法干预提供了证据参考，表明胸椎手法可能是更有效的选择。
items.titleZh: 胸椎手法与筋膜放松对肩峰撞击综合征患者疼痛、功能和本体感觉的影响：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验研究了胸椎手法与筋膜放松对肩峰撞击综合征患者疼痛、功能和本体感觉的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This randomized controlled trial compares the effects of thoracic manipulation and myofascial release on pain, function, and proprioception in shoulder impingement syndrome. If you treat such patients in clinical practice, this study provides evidence for choosing manual interventions, suggesting that thoracic manipulation might be a more effective option.

items.title: Capsular management in posterolateral total hip arthroplasty: impact on proprioception, balance, functional outcomes, and complications | Journal of Orthopaedic Surgery and Research | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A study explored the impact of capsular management in posterolateral total hip arthroplasty on proprioception, balance, functional outcomes, and complications.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究分析了后外侧全髋关节置换术中囊膜管理对本体感觉、平衡和功能预后的影响。它提醒你，在髋关节术后康复中，应关注囊膜修复对手术稳定性和本体感觉恢复的关键作用，并将这些因素整合到你的康复评估和训练方案中。
items.titleZh: 后外侧全髋关节置换术中的囊膜管理：对本体感觉、平衡、功能预后和并发症的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项研究探讨了后外侧全髋关节置换术中囊膜管理对本体感觉、平衡、功能预后和并发症的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study analyzes the impact of capsular management in posterolateral total hip arthroplasty on proprioception, balance, and functional outcomes. It reminds you that in hip arthroplasty rehabilitation, you should focus on the critical role of capsular repair in surgical stability and proprioception recovery, integrating these factors into your rehabilitation assessment and training programs.

items.title: Delayed body literacy in elite female athletes: a lived experience at age 30
items.summary: An article by a four-time Olympian and 10-time Olympic medallist discusses the delayed body literacy she experienced as an elite female athlete, only truly understanding her body's workings near age 30, despite it being her career vehicle.
items.curatedReason: 这篇来自奥运奖牌得主的文章强调了精英女运动员对自身身体认识的滞后性。它提醒你，在与女运动员（尤其是年轻运动员）合作时，应主动促进她们的身体素养，帮助她们理解生理周期、营养和训练之间的关系，以优化表现并预防损伤。
items.titleZh: 精英女运动员延迟的身体素养：30岁时的亲身经历
items.summaryZh: 一篇由四届奥运会选手和十届奥运奖牌得主撰写的文章，讲述了她作为一名精英女运动员所经历的身体素养滞后问题，尽管身体是她职业生涯的载体，但直到近30岁才真正了解自己的身体运作方式。
items.curatedReasonEn: This article from an Olympic medalist highlights the delayed body literacy among elite female athletes. It reminds you that when working with female athletes (especially younger ones), you should proactively promote their body literacy, helping them understand the relationship between their physiological cycle, nutrition, and training to optimize performance and prevent injuries.

items.title: Group-based versus one-to-one occupational therapy to improve ADL ability in people with chronic conditions: a pilot and feasibility RCT of the Go:OT study | Pilot and Feasibility Studies | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: A pilot and feasibility randomized controlled trial compared group-based versus one-to-one occupational therapy to improve ADL ability in people with chronic conditions.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对慢性病患者ADL能力改善的团队与一对一职业治疗的预可行性RCT表明，团队治疗可能与一对一治疗同样有效。这提示你，在资源受限或需要提升效率时，团队治疗可以作为一种可行的替代方案，但仍需大规模RCT进一步验证。
items.titleZh: 团队 vs. 一对一职业治疗改善慢性病患者ADL能力的Go:OT研究：一项预可行性随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项预可行性随机对照试验比较了团队治疗与一对一职业治疗在改善慢性病患者日常生活活动（ADL）能力方面的效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This pilot and feasibility RCT on group-based versus one-to-one occupational therapy to improve ADL ability in people with chronic conditions suggests that group therapy may be as effective as one-to-one. This indicates that group therapy can be a viable alternative in resource-constrained settings or when efficiency needs to be improved, though larger RCTs are still needed for further validation.

items.title: Daily symptom monitoring is sustainable over months: retention, not compliance, is the primary barrier to long-duration digital tracking
items.summary: This study found daily symptom monitoring sustainable over months, highlighting retention as the primary barrier to long-duration digital tracking rather than compliance.
items.curatedReason: 日常症状监测在数字追踪中可持续数月，但依从性（compliance）并非主要障碍，留存率（retention）才是关键。你在使用数字工具进行长期患者追踪时，要重点关注如何设计能保持患者长期参与的方案，而不是仅仅强调短期的数据录入。
items.titleZh: 日常症状监测可持续数月：留存率而非依从性是长期数字追踪的主要障碍
items.summaryZh: 这项研究发现日常症状监测可持续数月，并强调留存率而非依从性是长期数字追踪的主要障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: Daily symptom monitoring is sustainable for months with digital tracking, but compliance isn't the main barrier; retention is key. When using digital tools for long-term patient tracking, focus on designing solutions that maintain patient engagement over time, rather than just emphasizing short-term data entry.

items.title: Quantitative Ultrasonographic Assessment of Muscle Structure and Correlations with Motor Function Scales in Nusinersen-Treated Children with Spinal Muscular Atrophy
items.summary: This study investigated ultrasonographic muscle thickness and echointensity in children with spinal muscular atrophy receiving nusinersen, comparing them with healthy controls and correlating with motor function scale scores.
items.curatedReason: 对于脊髓性肌萎缩症（SMA）患儿，Nusinersen 治疗后超声评估肌肉结构与运动功能量表分数的相关性提供了客观生物标志物。这意味着你可以将超声作为辅助工具，更细致地评估和监测 SMA 患儿的肌肉变化，并与临床功能进展结合。
items.titleZh: Nusinersen 治疗脊髓性肌萎缩症患儿肌肉结构定量超声评估及其与运动功能量表的相关性
items.summaryZh: 本研究调查了接受 Nusinersen 治疗的脊髓性肌萎缩症（SMA）患儿的超声肌肉厚度和回声强度，并将其与健康对照组进行比较，同时评估了这些参数与运动功能量表分数的相关性。
items.curatedReasonEn: For children with spinal muscular atrophy (SMA), the correlation between ultrasonographic muscle structure and motor function scales after Nusinersen treatment provides objective biomarkers. This means you can use ultrasound as an adjunct to more precisely assess and monitor muscle changes in SMA children, integrating it with clinical functional progress.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Infographic. Ramadan: fasting with diabetes
items.summary: An infographic highlights the unique challenges faced by patients with diabetes who observe diurnal fasting during Ramadan, focusing on health risks and management in regions with high Muslim populations.
items.curatedReason: 这张信息图简要介绍了斋月期间糖尿病患者禁食的挑战。虽然不是直接的康复干预，但能帮你更好地理解和管理文化及宗教因素对患者健康行为的影响，尤其是在多文化背景的执业环境中。
items.titleZh: 信息图：斋月与糖尿病患者禁食
items.summaryZh: 一张信息图强调了斋月期间糖尿病患者进行昼间禁食所面临的独特挑战，重点关注在穆斯林人口众多的地区存在的健康风险和管理问题。
items.curatedReasonEn: This infographic briefly outlines the challenges of fasting for diabetic patients during Ramadan. While not a direct rehabilitation intervention, it can help you better understand and manage the impact of cultural and religious factors on patient health behaviors, especially in multicultural practice settings.

items.title: Manual therapy promotes prefrontal neural efficiency in chronic non-specific neck pain: An fNIRS-Based randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial found that combined manual therapy and exercise may improve prefrontal neural efficiency in chronic non-specific neck pain, suggesting a neurobiological mechanism for pain relief.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 提示，手法治疗结合运动可能通过改善前额叶神经网络效率来缓解慢性非特异性颈痛。这为联合干预的神经生理学机制提供了初步的客观证据。
items.titleZh: 手法治疗促进慢性非特异性颈痛患者前额叶神经效率：一项基于 fNIRS 的随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验发现，手法治疗结合运动可能通过改善前额叶神经网络效率来缓解慢性非特异性颈痛，提示了其神经生物学机制。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT suggests that manual therapy combined with exercise may alleviate chronic non-specific neck pain by improving prefrontal neural network efficiency. This provides initial objective evidence for the neurophysiological mechanisms of combined interventions.
items.limitation: 研究样本量与fNIRS测量方法的外推性是其主要局限。
items.limitationEn: The generalizability of the fNIRS measurement method and sample size are the primary limitations.

items.title: Toward Precision Cardiac Rehabilitation: Current Limitations and Future Opportunities of Omics and Artificial Intelligence.
items.summary: A review discusses current limitations and future opportunities for applying omics and artificial intelligence in cardiac rehabilitation, moving toward precision medicine tailored to individual patient characteristics.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述展望了组学和人工智能在心脏康复中的应用前景，提出了“精准心脏康复”的概念。你应该关注这些前沿技术如何改变未来心脏康复的评估与干预，但目前仍处于早期阶段。
items.titleZh: 迈向精准心脏康复：组学和人工智能的当前局限与未来机遇
items.summaryZh: 一篇综述探讨了组学和人工智能在心脏康复中的当前局限和未来机遇，旨在实现根据个体患者特征定制的精准康复。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review anticipates the prospects of omics and artificial intelligence in cardiac rehabilitation, introducing the concept of "precision cardiac rehabilitation." You should pay attention to how these cutting-edge technologies might transform future cardiac rehabilitation assessment and intervention, though they are still in early stages.
items.limitation: 这是一篇前瞻性综述，缺乏实证研究数据来支持其提出的精准康复模型。
items.limitationEn: This is a prospective review, lacking empirical research data to support its proposed precision rehabilitation model.

items.title: Linking the Pre-Assessment Information Form (PIF) to the ICF: Enhancing Standardized Functional Assessment in Parkinson's Disease.
items.summary: A study explored linking the Pre-Assessment Information Form (PIF) to the International Classification of Functioning, Disability and Health (ICF) to enhance standardized functional assessment in Parkinson's Disease.
items.curatedReason: 本研究探索了将帕金森病评估信息表（PIF）与 ICF 框架关联的方法，旨在标准化功能评估。这有助于实现跨服务、跨国界的帕金森患者功能数据可比性，是你实践中提升评估规范化的重要参考。
items.titleZh: 将评估前信息表 (PIF) 与 ICF 关联：增强帕金森病标准化功能评估
items.summaryZh: 一项研究探讨了将帕金森病评估前信息表（PIF）与国际功能、残疾和健康分类（ICF）关联，以增强帕金森病的标准化功能评估。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study explores linking the Parkinson's disease Pre-Assessment Information Form (PIF) with the ICF framework to standardize functional assessment. This is a crucial reference for you to improve assessment standardization, enabling comparable functional data across services and countries for Parkinson's patients.
items.limitation: 研究侧重于概念性关联，未直接评估实际临床应用中的数据一致性和有效性。
items.limitationEn: The study focuses on conceptual linkage and does not directly evaluate data consistency and validity in actual clinical application.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Wellbeing After Stroke-2 (WAterS-2): a feasibility study with process evaluation exploring inclusive, accessible, online psychological support after stroke
items.summary: A feasibility study with process evaluation explored inclusive, accessible, online psychological support based on Acceptance and Commitment Therapy (ACT) for psychological adjustment post-stroke, targeting underserved groups.
items.curatedReason: 这项可行性研究表明，通过线上心理支持和接纳与承诺疗法（ACT）来支持卒中患者心理调适是可行的。这对扩展卒中康复服务范围、触达未被充分服务的人群具有重要意义。
items.titleZh: 卒中后福祉-2 (WAterS-2)：一项探索卒中后包容、可及、在线心理支持的可行性研究与过程评估
items.summaryZh: 一项可行性研究及其过程评估，探讨了基于接纳与承诺疗法（ACT）的包容、可及的在线心理支持在卒中后心理调适中的可行性，旨在服务未被充分照护的人群。
items.curatedReasonEn: This feasibility study indicates that online psychological support and Acceptance and Commitment Therapy (ACT) are feasible for supporting stroke patients' psychological adjustment. This is significant for expanding stroke rehabilitation services and reaching underserved populations.
items.limitation: 这是一项单臂可行性研究，缺乏对照组，无法评估干预的实际疗效。
items.limitationEn: This is a single-arm feasibility study lacking a control group, thus unable to assess the actual efficacy of the intervention.

items.title: Effect of Visceral Manipulation Versus Integrated Neuromuscular Inhibition Technique in Shoulder Impingement Syndrome.
items.summary: A study compared visceral manipulation with integrated neuromuscular inhibition technique for shoulder impingement syndrome, finding differing effects on pain and function.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究比较了内脏手法与整合神经肌肉抑制技术治疗肩峰撞击综合征的短期效果。但其证据强度有限，不宜作为临床实践改变的依据。
items.titleZh: 内脏手法与整合神经肌肉抑制技术对肩峰撞击综合征的疗效比较
items.summaryZh: 一项研究比较了内脏手法与整合神经肌肉抑制技术在肩峰撞击综合征治疗中的效果，发现两者在疼痛和功能方面存在差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study compared the short-term effects of visceral manipulation versus integrated neuromuscular inhibition technique for shoulder impingement syndrome. However, its evidence strength is limited and should not be used as a basis for changing clinical practice.
items.limitation: 研究仅评估了短期效果，长期疗效和作用机制尚不明确。
items.limitationEn: The study only assessed short-term effects; long-term efficacy and mechanisms of action remain unclear.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Investigation of the Effectiveness of Extracorporeal Shock Wave Therapy and Kinesiotaping in Individuals With Carpal Tunnel Syndrome: A Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial of 54 individuals with mild to moderate carpal tunnel syndrome found extracorporeal shock wave therapy and kinesiotaping, combined with splinting and exercises, to be effective.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验表明体外冲击波疗法与肌内效贴在腕管综合征治疗中具有潜力。将冲击波疗法或肌内效贴作为腕部夹板和神经-肌腱滑动锻炼的辅助手段，可以为轻中度腕管综合征患者提供更好的治疗效果，特别是电生理改善。
items.titleZh: 体外冲击波疗法和肌内效贴在腕管综合征患者中有效性的调查：一项随机对照试验。
items.summaryZh: 一项针对54名轻中度腕管综合征患者的随机对照试验发现，体外冲击波疗法和肌内效贴结合腕部夹板和神经-肌腱滑动锻炼是有效的。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT suggests extracorporeal shock wave therapy and kinesiotaping show promise in carpal tunnel syndrome treatment. Consider adding shockwave therapy or kinesiotaping as adjuncts to wrist splinting and nerve-tendon gliding exercises for mild to moderate CTS, particularly for electrophysiological improvements.
items.limitation: 本研究的局限性在于样本量相对较小（54人），且随访期未明确，可能影响长期效果的评估。
items.limitationEn: The study's limitations include a relatively small sample size (54 participants) and an unspecified follow-up period, which may affect the assessment of long-term effects.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Bone-anchored prostheses for transtibial amputation: A systematic review of outcomes, complications, and cost-effectiveness
items.summary: A systematic review on bone-anchored prostheses for transtibial amputation examined outcomes, complications, and cost-effectiveness, revealing varying etiologies globally.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述提供了胫骨截肢患者骨锚固假体的全面评估。它强化了骨锚固假体在功能和并发症方面的优势与局限性，帮助你在临床中更好地为患者选择合适的假体方案，尤其要权衡其成本效益。
items.titleZh: 胫骨截肢骨锚固假体：一项关于结果、并发症和成本效益的系统综述。
items.summaryZh: 一项关于胫骨截肢骨锚固假体的系统综述考察了其结果、并发症和成本效益，揭示了全球范围内不同的病因。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review offers a comprehensive evaluation of bone-anchored prostheses for transtibial amputation. It reinforces the benefits and limitations of bone-anchored prostheses regarding function and complications, helping you select appropriate prosthetic solutions for patients, especially when considering cost-effectiveness.
items.limitation: 本系统综述的局限性在于纳入研究的异质性以及潜在的出版偏倚，且可能缺乏长期随访数据。
items.limitationEn: The limitations of this systematic review include the heterogeneity of included studies, potential publication bias, and possible lack of long-term follow-up data.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Investigating the Effectiveness of Multidisciplinary Rehabilitation for Persistent Post-Concussive Symptoms.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study evaluated an individualized multidisciplinary rehabilitation program for persistent post-concussive symptoms, identifying initial symptoms that predict overall symptom burden after rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性队列研究支持个性化多学科康复在治疗持续性脑震荡后症状方面的有效性。你需要将多学科方法整合到实践中，并利用初期症状预测患者的康复结果。
items.titleZh: 调查多学科康复对持续性脑震荡后症状的有效性。
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究评估了个性化多学科康复项目治疗持续性脑震荡后症状的有效性，并确定了预测康复后总体症状负担的初期症状。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective cohort study supports the efficacy of individualized multidisciplinary rehabilitation for persistent post-concussive symptoms. You should integrate multidisciplinary approaches into your practice and use initial symptoms to predict patient outcomes.
items.limitation: 作为回顾性队列研究，其局限性在于可能存在选择偏倚和混杂因素，且数据来源于单一中心。
items.limitationEn: As a retrospective cohort study, its limitations include potential selection bias and confounding factors, with data from a single center.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Low Back Pain: A Review.
items.summary: A review in JAMA highlights low back pain as a leading cause of disability globally, with approximately 90% of cases being nonspecific.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述强调了腰痛的全球负担和非特异性腰痛的普遍性。你需要加强对非特异性腰痛的鉴别诊断能力，并根据最新证据制定个性化治疗方案。
items.titleZh: 腰痛：一篇综述。
items.summaryZh: 《美国医学会杂志》上的一篇综述指出，腰痛是全球致残的主要原因，其中约90%为非特异性腰痛。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review highlights the global burden and prevalence of nonspecific low back pain. You should enhance your diagnostic skills for nonspecific low back pain and tailor individualized treatment plans based on the latest evidence.
items.limitation: 本综述为叙述性综述，可能存在作者偏倚和未能涵盖所有相关文献的局限。
items.limitationEn: This is a narrative review, subject to author bias and potentially not covering all relevant literature.

items.title: Between the Snap and the Return: A Prospective Narrative Analysis of Four Voices from inside Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction Recovery.
items.summary: A prospective narrative analysis explored four patients' evolving experiences throughout anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction recovery.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性叙事分析深入探讨了四位患者在ACL重建术后康复过程中的经验，弥补了横断面研究的不足。这能够帮助你更全面地理解ACL患者在不同康复阶段的心理和生理变化，从而提供更具个体化和情感支持的康复干预。
items.titleZh: 从发球到回击之间：前交叉韧带重建术后康复中四位患者的前瞻性叙事分析
items.summaryZh: 本研究通过前瞻性叙事分析，探索了四位患者在前交叉韧带（ACL）重建术后康复过程中不断变化的体验。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective narrative analysis delves into the experiences of four patients during ACL reconstruction recovery, complementing the limitations of cross-sectional studies. This can help you more comprehensively understand the psychological and physiological changes in ACL patients at different rehabilitation stages, thereby providing more individualized and emotionally supportive rehabilitation interventions.
items.limitation: 本研究为叙事分析，样本量较小（4位患者），结果的普遍性有限。
items.limitationEn: This is a narrative analysis with a small sample size (4 patients), limiting the generalizability of its findings.

items.title: Phase-specific analysis of 180° turning gait in post-stroke hemiplegia.
items.summary: This study analyzed 180° turning gait in post-stroke hemiplegia patients across approach, turning, and departure phases to reveal detailed characteristics.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究对卒中偏瘫患者180°转身步态进行了分阶段分析，揭示了转身过程中不同阶段的详细特征。这些数据能让你更精细地评估患者的转身功能障碍，从而设计更具针对性的神经康复训练方案。
items.titleZh: 卒中偏瘫患者180°转身步态的分阶段分析
items.summaryZh: 本研究对卒中偏瘫患者180°转身步态进行了分阶段分析，以揭示其在接近、转身和离开阶段的详细特征。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study conducted a phase-specific analysis of 180° turning gait in post-stroke hemiplegia patients, revealing detailed characteristics of different turning phases. This data will enable you to more precisely evaluate patients' turning functional deficits and design more targeted neurological rehabilitation training programs.
items.limitation: 研究仅限于180°转身，可能无法完全代表日常生活中的其他复杂转身动作。
items.limitationEn: The study is limited to 180° turns and may not fully represent other complex turning movements in daily life.

items.title: Accuracy of visual estimation of shoulder abduction by expert physiotherapists: a comparative study using 3D motion capture.
items.summary: A comparative study found that expert physiotherapists' visual estimation of shoulder abduction, even with video assistance, showed only moderate to good agreement (ICC 0.70-0.84) with 3D motion capture, suggesting potential inaccuracies in clinical practice.
items.curatedReason: 专家在视频辅助下对肩关节外展角度的目测准确性只有中度到良好水平 (ICC 0.70-0.84)。这意味着日常临床中仅凭目测可能高估或低估患者 ROM。
items.titleZh: 专家物理治疗师目测肩关节外展角度的准确性：一项使用 3D 运动捕捉的比较研究
items.summaryZh: 一项比较研究发现，即使有视频辅助，专家物理治疗师对肩关节外展的目测准确性与 3D 运动捕捉的一致性仅为中度至良好 (ICC 0.70-0.84)，提示临床实践中可能存在不准确性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Expert visual estimation of shoulder abduction range of motion, even with video assistance, shows only moderate to good agreement (ICC 0.70-0.84) with 3D motion capture. This implies that relying solely on visual estimation in daily practice might lead to over- or underestimation of patient ROM.
items.limitation: 研究仅评估了肩关节外展一个平面的 ROM 目测准确性，且未探究不同经验水平理疗师的差异。
items.limitationEn: The study only assessed visual estimation accuracy for shoulder abduction in one plane and did not explore differences among physiotherapists with varying experience levels.

items.title: Efficacy of repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation combined with soft robotic glove training for slight-to-moderate post-stroke upper limb spasticity: a randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: 一项随机对照试验（N=54）显示，重复经颅磁刺激（rTMS）联合软性机器人手套训练能改善轻中度卒中后上肢痉挛患者的腕屈肌痉挛和上肢运动功能。
items.curatedReason: rTMS联合软性机器人手套训练对卒中后上肢痉挛的改善效果显著。对于有轻中度上肢痉挛的卒中患者，这提供了一个有潜力的新型联合干预方案，值得你考虑引入临床。
items.titleZh: 重复经颅磁刺激联合软性机器人手套训练治疗轻中度卒中后上肢痉挛的疗效：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项涵盖54例患者的随机对照试验表明，重复经颅磁刺激（rTMS）与软性机器人手套训练相结合，能有效改善轻中度卒中后上肢痉挛患者的腕屈肌痉挛和上肢运动功能。
items.curatedReasonEn: rTMS combined with soft robotic glove training shows significant improvement for post-stroke upper limb spasticity. For stroke patients with mild-to-moderate upper limb spasticity, this offers a promising new combined intervention, which you should consider for clinical integration.
items.limitation: 样本量相对较小（54例），需要更大规模的研究进一步验证其长期效果和适用人群。
items.limitationEn: The sample size is relatively small (54 patients), and larger studies are needed to further validate long-term effects and applicable populations.

items.title: Rehabilitation and Quality of Life for Aging People Living With HIV: Addressing Multimorbidity and Stigma.
items.summary: 一篇视点文章指出，随着HIV感染者寿命延长，老龄化HIV感染者的康复需求日益增加，涉及多重合并症和病耻感。
items.curatedReason: 随着HIV感染者老龄化，其康复需求日益凸显，且涉及多重合并症和病耻感。作为物理治疗师，你需要关注这类人群的特殊需求，特别是老年康复策略与心理社会支持的整合。
items.titleZh: HIV感染者老龄化群体的康复与生活质量：应对多重合并症与病耻感
items.summaryZh: 一篇视点文章强调，随着抗逆转录病毒疗法的普及，HIV已转变为慢性病，导致感染者老龄化。到2030年，预计70%的HIV感染者将超过50岁，这带来了多重合并症和病耻感等新的康复挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: As the HIV population ages, their rehabilitation needs, complicated by multimorbidity and stigma, are becoming more prominent. As a physical therapist, you need to be aware of the specific needs of this population, especially regarding the integration of geriatric rehabilitation strategies and psychosocial support.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Crossroads in Spinal Cord Injury Treatment: A Multidisciplinary Conference at a Pivotal Moment.
items.summary: This narrative summarizes key themes and discussions from the "Crossroads in Spinal Cord Injury Treatment" conference, which brought together multidisciplinary experts to examine future directions in SCI care and research.
items.curatedReason: 此次多学科会议的总结强调了脊髓损伤治疗的未来方向。作为临床医生，关注这些前沿主题有助于你了解和整合最新的治疗理念与研究进展，提前布局潜在的新技术和协作模式。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤治疗的十字路口：关键时刻的多学科会议
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述总结了“脊髓损伤治疗的十字路口”会议的关键主题和讨论，此次会议汇集了多学科专家，旨在探讨脊髓损伤（SCI）护理和研究的未来方向。
items.curatedReasonEn: This multidisciplinary conference summary highlights future directions in spinal cord injury treatment. As a clinician, staying abreast of these cutting-edge topics helps you understand and integrate the latest therapeutic concepts and research advancements, proactively positioning for potential new technologies and collaborative models.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Investigating naming error patterns after non-invasive brain stimulation and language treatment in persons with aphasia
items.summary: This preprint study investigated naming error patterns after non-invasive brain stimulation (right cerebellar tDCS) paired with computerized aphasia therapy in persons with aphasia, suggesting a potential shift in error types from semantic to phonological/neologistic.
items.curatedReason: 这项预印本研究探讨了无创脑刺激结合语言治疗对失语症患者命名错误模式的影响。结果提示，右侧小脑 tDCS 辅助计算机失语症治疗可能会改变命名错误类型。如果你关注神经调控技术，这提供了一个早期信号，但作为预印本，结论仍需同行评审。
items.titleZh: 非侵入性脑刺激和语言治疗后失语症患者命名错误模式的研究
items.summaryZh: 这项预印本研究调查了非侵入性脑刺激（右侧小脑 tDCS）结合计算机失语症治疗后，失语症患者命名错误模式的变化，提示错误类型可能从语义错误转向语音/新词错误。
items.curatedReasonEn: This preprint investigates the impact of non-invasive brain stimulation combined with language treatment on naming error patterns in persons with aphasia. Results suggest that right cerebellar tDCS combined with computerized aphasia therapy may alter naming error types. If you follow neuromodulation techniques, this provides an early signal, but as a preprint, conclusions require peer review.
items.limitation: 这是一篇预印本文章，尚未经过同行评审。研究设计为小样本探索性研究，未报告关键统计量，结果需谨慎解读。
items.limitationEn: This is a preprint article and has not yet undergone peer review. The study design is a small-sample exploratory study, and key statistics are not reported, so results should be interpreted with caution.

items.title: Using visual biofeedback to reduce step length error at fast walking speeds is feasible after stroke
items.summary: A study on medRxiv suggests that using visual biofeedback to reduce step length error at fast walking speeds is feasible for individuals after stroke.
items.curatedReason: 这项预印本研究表明，在卒中后患者中，使用视觉生物反馈来减少快走速度下的步长误差是可行的。这为卒中后步态训练提供了新的、有潜力的技术方向，值得临床医生关注。
items.titleZh: 使用视觉生物反馈减少快走速度下的步长误差在卒中后患者中是可行的
items.summaryZh: 这项预印本研究表明，在卒中后患者中，使用视觉生物反馈技术来减少快走速度下的步长误差是可行的，为卒中后步态训练提供了新的方法。
items.curatedReasonEn: This preprint study indicates that using visual biofeedback to reduce step length error at fast walking speeds is feasible in post-stroke patients. This offers a novel and potentially valuable technical approach for gait training after stroke, worthy of clinician attention.
items.limitation: 预印本研究，尚未经过同行评审；样本量较小（n=23）。
items.limitationEn: Preprint study, not yet peer-reviewed; relatively small sample size (n=23).

items.title: Appropriate translational designs for determining causal force-based (manual therapy) treatment mechanisms.
items.summary: A review highlights the need for translational designs to establish causal mechanisms in force-based manual therapy, identifying current study limitations in demonstrating 'why' and 'how' treatments work.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述探讨了手法治疗机制研究设计的局限性，强调需要更具因果推断能力的设计。它为该领域的研究者提供了重要的思考方向，但尚未直接改变临床实践。
items.titleZh: 确定手法治疗机制的恰当转化研究设计：基于力的治疗。
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述强调了在手法治疗中，研究设计需要能够阐明治疗机制的因果关系，指出当前研究在解释治疗“为何”和“如何”起效方面存在不足。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review explores limitations in translational study designs for manual therapy mechanisms, emphasizing the need for more causally inferential designs. It provides important considerations for researchers in the field but does not directly alter clinical practice.
items.limitation: 研究设计方法论的探讨，结论不直接涉及具体临床应用。
items.limitationEn: Discussion of research design methodology, with conclusions not directly related to specific clinical applications.

items.title: [Comment] Highlights 2026 photography competition: health and humanity in focus
items.summary: Commentary on The Lancet's annual photography competition, highlighting past winning images and announcing the opening of submissions for Highlights 2026.
items.curatedReason: 这是《柳叶刀》摄影比赛的评论，与临床实践或研究无直接关联。
items.titleZh: [评论] Highlights 2026 摄影比赛：聚焦健康与人文
items.summaryZh: 这篇评论介绍了《柳叶刀》年度摄影比赛，回顾了往届获奖作品，并宣布 Highlights 2026 摄影比赛开始接受投稿。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is a commentary on The Lancet's photography competition and has no direct relevance to clinical practice or research.

items.title: [Comment] The Wakley Prize 2026: learning experience
items.summary: A commentary reflects on the learning experience in medicine, emphasizing that mastery is transient and continuous learning is essential, especially for early-career clinicians.
items.curatedReason: 这篇评论分享了关于医学学习和实践的感悟，特别是对早期职业临床医生的启发，与物理治疗的直接关联性较低。
items.titleZh: [评论] The Wakley Prize 2026：学习经历
items.summaryZh: 这篇评论引用了医生作家的话，强调医学实践中不断学习的重要性，尤其对于早期职业临床医生而言。
items.curatedReasonEn: This commentary shares reflections on medical learning and practice, particularly inspiring for early-career clinicians, with low direct relevance to physical therapy.

items.title: [World Report] WHO and Africa CDC launch $518 million Ebola plan
items.summary: World report on the launch of a $518 million Ebola plan by WHO and Africa CDC to control the Bundibugyo Ebola virus outbreak.
items.curatedReason: 世界报道，关于 WHO 和非洲 CDC 启动一项埃博拉防控计划。与物理治疗的直接相关性不高。
items.titleZh: [世界报道] WHO 与非洲 CDC 启动 5.18 亿美元的埃博拉计划
items.summaryZh: 世界报道称，WHO 与非洲 CDC 联合启动了一项 5.18 亿美元的埃博拉计划，以期统一协调控制 Bundibugyo 埃博拉病毒疫情。
items.curatedReasonEn: World report on WHO and Africa CDC launching an Ebola preparedness plan. Low direct relevance to physical therapy.

items.title: [World Report] Petition calls for boycott of Israeli Medical Association
items.summary: World report on a petition calling for the suspension of the Israeli Medical Association from the World Medical Association over its stance on Gaza.
items.curatedReason: 世界报道，关于抵制以色列医学会的请愿。此新闻与公共卫生或政治相关，与物理治疗临床实践无直接关联。
items.titleZh: [世界报道] 请愿呼吁抵制以色列医学会
items.summaryZh: 世界报道称，有批评者呼吁暂停以色列医学会（IMA）在世界医学会（WMA）的会员资格，理由是其在加沙问题上的立场。
items.curatedReasonEn: World report on a petition calling for a boycott of the Israeli Medical Association. This news is related to public health or politics and has no direct relevance to physical therapy clinical practice.

items.title: [World Report] The medicine of…cruise ships
items.summary: World report examining the practice of medicine on cruise ships, going beyond recent outbreaks to discuss day-to-day medical operations.
items.curatedReason: 世界报道，探讨邮轮上的医疗实践，提到了过去的疫情，但主要内容是日常医疗，与 PT 实践关系不大。
items.titleZh: [世界报道] 邮轮上的医学
items.summaryZh: 这篇世界报道探讨了邮轮上的医学实践，虽然提到了过去的疫情，但重点在于日常的医疗工作。
items.curatedReasonEn: World report discussing medical practice on cruise ships, mentioning past outbreaks but focusing on daily practice, which has little relation to PT practice.

items.title: [Perspectives] Art on repeat prescription
items.summary: A perspective piece discusses the restorative benefits of engaging in activities like reading, writing, and painting during stressful times, contrasting this with doctors potentially being less likely to participate.
items.curatedReason: 视角文章，作者分享了艺术活动对个人的舒缓作用，并担忧医生可能较少参与此类活动。此文更多是关于个人福祉的探讨，与 PT 临床干预关联性不强。
items.titleZh: [视角] 艺术处方
items.summaryZh: 这篇视角文章分享了作者在压力下通过阅读、写作和绘画等艺术活动获得身心舒缓的体验，并对医生可能较少参与此类活动表示担忧。
items.curatedReasonEn: Perspective piece where the author shares the soothing effects of artistic activities on individuals and expresses concern that doctors may engage less in such activities. This article is more about personal well-being and has weak relevance to PT clinical interventions.

items.title: [Perspectives] Between two worlds: war, memory, and what resists within
items.summary: A perspective piece reflects on living between two worlds—war and medical practice—and how personal experiences influence patient care and resilience.
items.curatedReason: 视角文章，作者分享了在战乱背景下的个人经历和对患者治疗的思考，内容偏向个人叙述和情感表达，与 PT 临床实践的直接关联性较低。
items.titleZh: [视角] 两个世界之间：战争、记忆与内在的抵抗
items.summaryZh: 这篇视角文章作者分享了身处战争阴影下，在个人经历与临床实践之间进行思考的体验。
items.curatedReasonEn: Perspective piece where the author shares personal experiences amidst war and reflections on patient treatment. The content leans towards personal narrative and emotional expression, with low direct relevance to PT clinical practice.

items.title: [Obituary] J Craig Venter
items.summary: Obituary for J Craig Venter, a geneticist and entrepreneur known for sequencing the first microbial genome and establishing a rival to the Human Genome Project.
items.curatedReason: 讣告，纪念遗传学家 J Craig Venter。与物理治疗临床实践无直接关联。
items.titleZh: [讣告] J Craig Venter
items.summaryZh: 这篇讣告纪念了遗传学家 J Craig Venter，他完成了首个微生物基因组测序，并创立了与人类基因组计划相竞争的公司。
items.curatedReasonEn: Obituary commemorating geneticist J Craig Venter. No direct relevance to physical therapy clinical practice.

items.title: Short-term relaxation after cervical rotatory manipulation is more closely associated with somatosensory input than cracking sound: a randomized controlled EEG study
items.summary: A randomized controlled EEG study found that short-term relaxation after cervical rotatory manipulation is more closely associated with somatosensory input than the cracking sound.
items.curatedReason: 颈椎旋转手法治疗后的短期放松感，似乎与体感输入而非“咔哒声”更相关。这提示你应更关注手法对神经生理的影响，而不是仅以关节弹响作为疗效指标。
items.titleZh: 颈椎旋转手法治疗后的短期放松与体感输入而非弹响声更密切相关：一项随机对照脑电图研究
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照脑电图研究发现，颈椎旋转手法治疗后的短期放松与体感输入而非弹响声更密切相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: Short-term relaxation after cervical rotatory manipulation appears more associated with somatosensory input than the "cracking sound." This suggests you should focus more on the neurophysiological effects of manual therapy rather than solely using joint cavitation as an indicator of efficacy.
items.limitation: 该研究为随机对照脑电图研究，但可能存在样本量和结局指标的局限性。
items.limitationEn: This is a randomized controlled EEG study, but may have limitations in sample size and outcome measures.

items.title: Efficacy of High-Intensity Laser Therapy for Meralgia Paresthetica: A Randomized, Double-Blind, Sham-Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized, double-blind, sham-controlled trial (N=54 analyzed) found 12 sessions of High-Intensity Laser Therapy (HILT) significantly improved pain (Numeric Rating Scale: -6.4 vs -1.8, p<0.001) and function (MPQ-S: -11.9 vs -3.5, p<0.001) compared to sham in Meralgia Paresthetica (MP) patients at 12 weeks.
items.curatedReason: 高强度激光治疗（HILT）在股外侧皮神经卡压综合征（MP）疼痛和功能改善上显著优于假治疗，并可能改善神经传导。可以将其作为一种有效的非侵入性治疗手段纳入你的方案。
items.titleZh: 高强度激光治疗股外侧皮神经卡压综合征的疗效：一项随机、双盲、假对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机、双盲、假对照试验（N=54分析）发现，对于股外侧皮神经卡压综合征（MP）患者，12周内12次高强度激光治疗（HILT）在改善疼痛（数字评定量表：-6.4 vs -1.8, p<0.001）和功能（MPQ-S: -11.9 vs -3.5, p<0.001）方面显著优于假治疗。
items.curatedReasonEn: High-Intensity Laser Therapy (HILT) significantly outperforms sham treatment for pain and functional improvement in Meralgia Paresthetica (MP), and may also improve nerve conduction. You can incorporate it as an effective non-invasive treatment option into your protocols.
items.limitation: 随访期相对较短（12周），长期疗效仍需进一步研究。
items.limitationEn: The follow-up period was relatively short (12 weeks), and long-term efficacy requires further investigation.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: "Comparison Between Robotic and Conventional Walking Recovery Training Methods in People With Spinal Cord Injury": Systematic Review with Pairwise and Network meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and network meta-analysis of 16 studies compared Robotic Body Weight Supported Treadmill Training (RBWSTT), Overground Robotic Exoskeleton Training (ORET), and Conventional Physiotherapy (CP) on gait and cardiovascular outcomes in individuals with Spinal Cord Injury (SCI).
items.curatedReason: 对于脊髓损伤患者的步行恢复训练，机器人辅助训练（RBWSTT, ORET）与传统物理治疗的疗效对比仍存在争议。在具体患者选择时，结合伤情、资源和个体反应，可以考虑作为传统治疗的辅助或替代方案。
items.titleZh: 机器人与传统步行恢复训练方法在脊髓损伤患者中的比较：系统综述与配对及网络荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项包含16项研究的系统综述和网络荟萃分析比较了机器人体重支持跑步机训练（RBWSTT）、地面机器人外骨骼训练（ORET）和传统物理治疗（CP）对脊髓损伤患者步态和心血管结局的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: The comparison between robotic-assisted training (RBWSTT, ORET) and conventional physiotherapy for walking recovery in SCI patients remains controversial. When selecting for specific patients, consider robotic options as adjuncts or alternatives to conventional therapy, based on injury characteristics, resources, and individual response.
items.limitation: 纳入研究（N=16）数量较少，不同干预类型和患者亚组间的比较数据有限。
items.limitationEn: The number of included studies (N=16) was small, and comparative data between different intervention types and patient subgroups were limited.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Community-Based Exercise for Chronic Pain in People with Spinal Cord Injury: A Pragmatic Randomized Controlled Trial
items.summary: A pragmatic randomized controlled trial tested the hypothesis that home/community-based exercise, prescribed according to the Spinal Cord Injury (SCI) Exercise Guidelines, reduces chronic pain.
items.curatedReason: 按照脊髓损伤（SCI）运动指南制定的社区居家运动方案，有望有效减轻慢性疼痛。这坐实了指南的重要性，并支持你推广此类社区康复模式。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤者慢性疼痛的社区运动：一项实用随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项实用随机对照试验旨在验证根据脊髓损伤（SCI）运动指南制定的居家/社区运动方案是否能减轻慢性疼痛。
items.curatedReasonEn: Community- and home-based exercise programs, prescribed according to SCI Exercise Guidelines, are likely effective in reducing chronic pain. This affirms the importance of these guidelines and supports your promotion of such community rehabilitation models.
items.limitation: 未提供具体研究方法和结果数据，无法评估具体效应量和局限性。
items.limitationEn: Specific research methods and outcome data were not provided, making it impossible to assess specific effect sizes and limitations.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: "Are Cardiac Rehabilitation Programs Effective in Improving Aerobic Capacity for People with Transient Ischemic Attack and Stroke? A Rapid Review and Meta-analysis".
items.summary: A rapid review and meta-analysis of nine studies (N=490) found that exercise-based cardiac rehabilitation was effective in improving aerobic capacity for people with stroke or transient ischemic attack (TIA).
items.curatedReason: 对于卒中或短暂性脑缺血发作（TIA）患者，基于运动的心脏康复似乎能有效改善有氧能力。考虑将心脏康复元素整合到神经康复方案中，尤其对于有氧能力受损的患者。
items.titleZh: 心脏康复计划在改善短暂性脑缺血发作和卒中患者有氧能力方面的有效性：快速综述与荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项包含9项研究（N=490）的快速综述和荟萃分析发现，基于运动的心脏康复在改善卒中或短暂性脑缺血发作（TIA）患者的有氧能力方面是有效的。
items.curatedReasonEn: For individuals with stroke or TIA, exercise-based cardiac rehabilitation appears effective in improving aerobic capacity. Consider integrating cardiac rehabilitation elements into your neurorehabilitation programs, especially for those with impaired aerobic capacity.
items.limitation: 纳入研究（N=490）数量较少，且质量多为低至中等。
items.limitationEn: The number of included studies (N=490) was small, and their quality was mostly low to moderate.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Effectiveness of physical therapy techniques and methods in the management of endometriosis symptoms: A systematic review with meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review with meta-analysis evaluated the effectiveness of different physical therapy methods and techniques in improving symptoms triggered by endometriosis.
items.curatedReason: 这份系统综述和荟萃分析总结了物理治疗技术在子宫内膜异位症症状管理中的有效性。在临床实践中，你可以依据这些证据，考虑将特定的物理治疗干预整合到子宫内膜异位症患者的综合治疗方案中。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗技术和方法在子宫内膜异位症症状管理中的有效性：一项系统综述与荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述与荟萃分析评估了不同物理治疗方法和技术在改善子宫内膜异位症症状方面的有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis summarizes the effectiveness of physical therapy techniques in managing endometriosis symptoms. In clinical practice, you can consider integrating specific physical therapy interventions into comprehensive treatment plans for endometriosis patients based on this evidence.
items.limitation: 纳入研究的方法学质量存在差异，且许多研究样本量较小，可能影响结果的综合强度。
items.limitationEn: Variations in methodological quality and small sample sizes in many included studies may affect the overall strength of the results.

items.title: From rehabilitation to performance: reframing vestibular-ocular interventions to optimise sports performance.
items.summary: This article discusses reframing vestibular-ocular interventions to optimize sports performance, moving beyond traditional rehabilitation contexts.
items.curatedReason: 将前庭-眼动干预从传统康复范畴扩展至运动表现优化，提供了新的视角。这提示你，在评估和训练运动员时，可以考虑整合这些技术以提升运动表现和减少伤害风险。
items.titleZh: 从康复到表现：重新定义前庭-眼动干预以优化运动表现
items.summaryZh: 本文探讨了重新定义前庭-眼动干预以优化运动表现，超越了传统的康复语境。
items.curatedReasonEn: Reframing vestibular-ocular interventions from traditional rehabilitation to sports performance optimization offers a new perspective. This suggests that when assessing and training athletes, you can consider integrating these techniques to enhance athletic performance and reduce injury risk.

items.title: Management of Labral Tears Associated with Glenohumeral Instability in Athletes.
items.summary: This review examines the current literature on the evaluation and management of glenoid labral tears associated with glenohumeral instability in athletes, emphasizing classification, mechanism, bone loss, and patient-specific factors.
items.curatedReason: 关于运动员肩盂盂唇撕裂伴盂肱关节不稳的评估和管理，这篇综述提供了当前文献概览。你可以利用其总结的分类、机制和风险因素，来指导你的临床评估和治疗决策。
items.titleZh: 运动员盂肱关节不稳相关盂唇撕裂的管理。
items.summaryZh: 本综述审视了当前关于运动员盂肱关节不稳相关盂唇撕裂评估与管理的文献，强调了分类、机制、骨缺损和患者特异性因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review provides an overview of current literature on the evaluation and management of glenoid labral tears with glenohumeral instability in athletes. You can use its summarized classifications, mechanisms, and risk factors to guide your clinical assessment and treatment decisions.
items.limitation: 作为一篇综述，其证据等级低于系统综述或RCT。
items.limitationEn: As a review, its evidence level is lower than that of a systematic review or RCT.

items.title: [Perspectives] Satendra Singh: reframing disability through advocacy
items.summary: A perspective piece profiles Satendra Singh, a physician and disability activist, highlighting his journey and advocacy in reframing disability.
items.curatedReason: 这篇文章是关于一位印度医生兼残疾倡导者的访谈。你可以从中了解到倡导如何塑造对残疾的看法和政策，这对于理解患者的社会背景及其康复路径有一定启发。
items.titleZh: 萨滕德拉·辛格：通过倡导重新定义残疾。
items.summaryZh: 一篇视角文章介绍了医生兼残疾倡导者萨滕德拉·辛格，突出他的个人历程和在重新定义残疾方面的倡导工作。
items.curatedReasonEn: This article is an interview with an Indian physician and disability activist. You can learn how advocacy shapes perceptions and policies regarding disability, which can be insightful for understanding patients' social context and rehabilitation pathways.

items.title: Sex and gender differences in technology-based rehabilitation for people with stroke: A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review mapped evidence on sex and gender differences in technology-assisted stroke rehabilitation, identifying significant gaps and highlighting the need for equitable approaches.
items.curatedReason: 这份范围综述突出了中风技术辅助康复中性别差异研究的不足。你在设计康复方案或评估技术工具时，请留意这种潜在偏倚，并期待未来有更多针对性的研究来指导临床实践。
items.titleZh: 中风患者技术辅助康复中性别差异的范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述梳理了技术辅助中风康复中性别差异的证据，发现显著的空白，并强调了采取公平方法的重要性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review highlights the lack of research on sex and gender differences in technology-assisted stroke rehabilitation. When designing rehabilitation programs or evaluating tech tools, be mindful of this potential bias and anticipate more targeted research to guide future clinical practice.
items.limitation: 本研究为范围综述，侧重于文献映射而非证据综合分析。
items.limitationEn: This is a scoping review, focusing on mapping literature rather than synthesizing evidence comprehensively.

items.title: Changes in Unimanual and Bimanual Upper Extremity Use During the Subacute Phase Post-Stroke Assessed in Supervised and Unsupervised Contexts.
items.summary: 一项纵向研究评估了卒中亚急性期患者在监督和非监督环境下，单手与双手上肢使用模式的变化。
items.curatedReason: 本研究揭示了卒中亚急性期患侧上肢功能恢复的细微模式，尤其区分了监督和非监督环境下的单手与双手使用情况。这提醒你在居家指导中需关注非监督环境下的实际使用情况。
items.titleZh: 卒中亚急性期在监督和非监督环境下患侧上肢单手与双手使用情况的变化
items.summaryZh: 这项纵向研究在卒中亚急性期评估了患者在监督和非监督两种情境下，患侧上肢单手和双手使用模式如何随时间变化。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study reveals subtle patterns of paretic upper extremity recovery in subacute stroke, particularly differentiating unimanual and bimanual use in supervised versus unsupervised contexts. This highlights the importance of observing actual usage in unsupervised settings during home guidance.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小，结果外推性受限。
items.limitationEn: The study has a small sample size, limiting the generalizability of its findings.

items.title: Physiotherapy management of Long-COVID: an evidence-based approach.
items.summary: A review provides an evidence-based approach to the physiotherapy management of Long-COVID, a heterogeneous and multisystemic condition following SARS-CoV-2 infection.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述为Long-COVID的物理治疗管理提供了基于证据的方法。它为你提供了最新的临床框架，帮助你理解并干预这种多系统、异质性强的疾病，但要记住，Long-COVID的证据仍在不断演进。
items.titleZh: Long-COVID的物理治疗管理：一种基于证据的方法
items.summaryZh: 一篇综述为Long-COVID的物理治疗管理提供了一种基于证据的方法，该疾病是一种感染SARS-CoV-2后可能出现的异质性、偶发性、多系统性疾病。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review provides an evidence-based approach to the physiotherapy management of Long-COVID. It offers you an updated clinical framework to understand and intervene in this multisystemic, heterogeneous condition, but remember that Long-COVID evidence is still evolving.
items.limitation: 作为一篇综述，其结论的强度依赖于所引用研究的质量和异质性。
items.limitationEn: As a review, the strength of its conclusions depends on the quality and heterogeneity of the cited studies.

items.title: Perspectives on an advanced practice physiotherapy-led model for musculoskeletal care in Canada: A qualitative study of patients and multidisciplinary clinicians.
items.summary: A qualitative study in Canada reveals that while Advanced Practice Physiotherapy (APP) shows promise in musculoskeletal care, systemic barriers limit its integration, highlighting diverse perspectives from patients and clinicians.
items.curatedReason: 加拿大一项定性研究揭示了患者和多学科临床医生对高级实践物理治疗师（APP）主导的肌肉骨骼护理模式的看法。APP在减轻全球医疗系统负担方面表现出潜力，但加拿大在系统整合上仍有障碍。这为希望深入了解 APP 模式在不同国家实施挑战和机遇的同行提供了宝贵视角。
items.titleZh: 加拿大高级实践物理治疗师主导的肌肉骨骼护理模式视角：一项患者和多学科临床医生的定性研究
items.summaryZh: 加拿大一项定性研究显示，患者和多学科临床医生对高级实践物理治疗师（APP）主导的肌肉骨骼护理模式持积极态度，但其在加拿大仍面临系统性整合障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study from Canada explores the perceptions of patients and multidisciplinary clinicians regarding Advanced Practice Physiotherapy (APP)-led musculoskeletal care. While APP shows promise in reducing healthcare burden globally, Canada faces systemic integration barriers. This offers valuable insight for peers interested in the implementation challenges and opportunities of APP models in various countries.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，结果可能不具备广泛代表性，且受访者数量有限。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative study, so its findings may not be broadly generalizable and the number of participants is limited.

items.title: Development of a predictive model for postoperative erectile function recovery in male patients with incomplete traumatic cervical spinal cord injury.
items.summary: A clinical prediction model was developed to forecast postoperative erectile function recovery in male patients with incomplete traumatic cervical spinal cord injury, a prevalent issue lacking sufficient predictive tools.
items.curatedReason: 该研究开发了预测不完全性创伤性颈脊髓损伤男性患者术后勃起功能恢复的模型。这个模型有助于你与患者沟通预后，并为性康复干预提供更早期的风险分层依据。
items.titleZh: 不完全性创伤性颈脊髓损伤男性患者术后勃起功能恢复预测模型的开发
items.summaryZh: 本研究开发了一个临床预测模型，用于预测不完全性创伤性颈脊髓损伤（CSCI）男性患者术后勃起功能恢复，以弥补当前预测工具的不足。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study developed a predictive model for postoperative erectile function recovery in male patients with incomplete traumatic cervical spinal cord injury. This model helps you communicate prognosis to patients and provides earlier risk stratification for sexual rehabilitation interventions.
items.limitation: 研究仅限于男性患者，且需外部验证来确认模型在不同人群中的普适性。
items.limitationEn: The study is limited to male patients, and external validation is needed to confirm the model's generalizability in diverse populations.
items.journal: European spine journal : official publication of the European Spine Society, the European Spinal Deformity Society, and the European Section of the Cervical Spine Research Society

items.title: Early Self-Efficacy Predicts Short- and Long-Term Pain and Functional Outcomes Following Lower Extremity Fracture
items.summary: This study aimed to identify which early psychosocial measures, particularly self-efficacy, are most predictive of short- and long-term pain severity, pain interference, physical function, and chronic pain following lower extremity fractures.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究发现早期自我效能感能预测下肢骨折患者短期和长期的疼痛与功能结局。这提示你，在康复早期评估并干预患者的自我效能感，可能对改善其长期康复效果至关重要。
items.titleZh: 早期自我效能感预测下肢骨折后的短期和长期疼痛及功能结局
items.summaryZh: 本研究旨在确定早期心理社会测量，特别是自我效能感，在下肢骨折恢复过程中对疼痛严重程度、疼痛干扰、身体功能和慢性疼痛的短期和长期预测作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study found that early self-efficacy predicts short- and long-term pain and functional outcomes in patients with lower extremity fractures. This suggests that assessing and intervening on patients' self-efficacy early in rehabilitation may be crucial for improving long-term rehabilitation outcomes.
items.limitation: 研究未明确说明样本量和随访长度，可能影响结果的强度和普适性。
items.limitationEn: The study does not clearly state the sample size and follow-up duration, which may affect the strength and generalizability of the results.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Early post-hospital trajectories of health-related quality of life for younger adult patients with traumatic brain injury
items.summary: This study characterized the early post-hospital trajectories of health-related quality of life (HRQOL) in younger adult patients with traumatic brain injury (TBI) during the first 8 weeks after discharge from acute care.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究描绘了年轻创伤性脑损伤（TBI）患者出院后早期（8周内）健康相关生活质量的轨迹。这为你提供了 TBI 患者急性期后 HRQOL 恢复模式的关键信息，有助于你更早地识别潜在问题并制定个性化康复计划。
items.titleZh: 年轻成人创伤性脑损伤患者出院后健康相关生活质量的早期轨迹
items.summaryZh: 本研究描述了年轻成人创伤性脑损伤（TBI）患者在急性医院护理出院后8周内，健康相关生活质量（HRQOL）的早期轨迹。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study outlines the early (within 8 weeks) post-discharge trajectories of health-related quality of life for younger adult patients with traumatic brain injury (TBI). This provides you with crucial information on HRQOL recovery patterns after the acute phase in TBI patients, helping you identify potential issues earlier and develop personalized rehabilitation plans.
items.limitation: 研究关注的是早期（8周内）轨迹，缺乏更长期的随访数据来评估远期效果。
items.limitationEn: The study focuses on early trajectories (within 8 weeks) and lacks longer-term follow-up data to assess distant outcomes.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Implementing Live Long Walk Strong: Practice-based evidence on adapting a physical therapy program across diverse contexts.
items.summary: A process evaluation describes the adaptation of "Live Long Walk Strong," an age-friendly physical therapy program designed to improve mobility in older adults, across four diverse clinical settings.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究描述了“Live Long Walk Strong”物理治疗项目在不同临床环境中如何进行适应性调整。这为你提供了在老年康复领域跨不同背景实施和调整现有项目的实践证据，有助于你提升项目的可及性和有效性。
items.titleZh: “Live Long Walk Strong”项目的实施：跨多样化背景调整物理治疗项目的实践证据
items.summaryZh: 一项过程评估描述了“Live Long Walk Strong”这一旨在改善老年人活动能力的物理治疗项目，如何在四个不同的临床环境中进行适应性调整，提供了实践证据。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study describes how the "Live Long Walk Strong" physical therapy program was adapted across diverse clinical contexts. This provides you with practice-based evidence for implementing and adapting existing programs in geriatric rehabilitation across different settings, helping you enhance program accessibility and effectiveness.
items.limitation: 本研究为过程评估，主要关注项目适应性，而非干预的最终效果或与对照组的比较。
items.limitationEn: This is a process evaluation, focusing primarily on program adaptability rather than ultimate intervention effects or comparison with control groups.
items.journal: PM & R : the journal of injury, function, and rehabilitation

items.title: [Editorial] Migration: a reality, not an emergency
items.summary: An editorial from The Lancet argues that migration is a fundamental human reality, often mislabeled as an emergency, impacting healthcare access for millions.
items.curatedReason: 这篇社论指出了移民问题不仅是全球公共卫生挑战，也影响移民群体的医疗可及性。作为物理治疗师，你需要意识到服务移民患者时可能面临的系统性障碍，如语言、文化差异和对医疗系统的不信任，并倡导建立更具包容性的医疗环境。
items.titleZh: [社论] 移民：现实而非紧急情况
items.summaryZh: 《柳叶刀》社论指出，移民是人类生活最古老的事实之一，却常被视为“紧急情况”，这导致移民在医疗上面临诸多障碍，例如害怕寻求医疗服务、在异国他乡工作强度大等。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial highlights that migration is not just a global public health challenge but also affects healthcare accessibility for immigrant populations. As a physical therapist, you need to be aware of systemic barriers when serving immigrant patients, such as language, cultural differences, and distrust of the healthcare system, and advocate for a more inclusive healthcare environment.

items.title: [Perspectives] The unfinished path towards patient safety
items.summary: This 'Perspectives' piece from The Lancet discusses the inherent trust patients place in healthcare systems during surgery and the ongoing path towards achieving robust patient safety.
items.curatedReason: 这篇评论文章强调了患者安全的重要性及其建立在信任之上的本质。作为临床实践者，你需要持续关注并优化患者安全流程，不仅是避免失误，更是维护患者对医疗系统的基本信任，提升患者体验。
items.titleZh: [观点] 患者安全未竟之路
items.summaryZh: 《柳叶刀》的这篇“观点”文章探讨了患者在接受手术时对医疗系统的信任，以及实现完善患者安全所面临的挑战和未竟之路。
items.curatedReasonEn: This commentary emphasizes the critical importance of patient safety, rooted in trust. As a clinician, you must continually focus on and optimize patient safety protocols, not just to prevent errors, but to uphold patients' fundamental trust in the healthcare system and enhance their experience.

items.title: Subregion-Specific Prefrontal Activation Predicts Fall Risk and Fall Timing in Older Adults with Mild Cognitive Impairment
items.summary: This study found that subregion-specific prefrontal cortex activation during dual-task walking predicts fall risk and fall timing in older adults with mild cognitive impairment.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究发现，双任务行走时前额叶皮层（PFC）激活模式可预测轻度认知障碍（MCI）老年人的跌倒风险和首次跌倒时间。将神经影像学指标纳入风险评估，有望更精细地识别高风险人群，并指导更精准的预防干预。
items.titleZh: 亚区域特异性前额叶激活可预测轻度认知障碍老年人的跌倒风险和跌倒时间。
items.summaryZh: 这项研究发现，双任务行走时前额叶皮层特定区域的激活可预测轻度认知障碍老年人的跌倒风险和首次跌倒时间。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study found that prefrontal cortex (PFC) activation patterns during dual-task walking can predict fall risk and time to first fall in older adults with mild cognitive impairment (MCI). Integrating neuroimaging markers into risk assessment holds promise for more precise identification of high-risk individuals and guiding targeted preventive interventions.
items.limitation: 研究对象仅限于轻度认知障碍老年人，结果可能不适用于其他人群。
items.limitationEn: The study population is limited to older adults with mild cognitive impairment, so the results may not be generalizable to other populations.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Physical Therapy Management of Children With Developmental Coordination Disorder: A 2026 Evidence-Based Clinical Practice Guideline from the American Physical Therapy Association Academy of Pediatric Physical Therapy
items.curatedReason: APTA 儿科物理治疗学会发布了 2026 年发育性协调障碍儿童物理治疗循证临床实践指南。这是你在管理此类患者时的权威参考，务必深入研读并应用于实践。
items.titleZh: 2026 年美国物理治疗协会儿科物理治疗学会发布的《发育性协调障碍儿童物理治疗管理循证临床实践指南》。
items.summaryZh: 美国物理治疗协会儿科物理治疗学会发布了 2026 年针对发育性协调障碍儿童物理治疗管理的循证临床实践指南。
items.curatedReasonEn: The APTA Academy of Pediatric Physical Therapy has released its 2026 evidence-based clinical practice guideline for the physical therapy management of children with Developmental Coordination Disorder. This is an authoritative resource for managing these patients; you must study it thoroughly and apply it in practice.

items.title: APTA Orthopedics: Hip Pain and Mobility Deficits—Hip Osteoarthritis: Revision 2025
items.curatedReason: APTA 骨科分会发布了 2025 年髋关节疼痛与活动受限——髋骨关节炎指南的修订版。这是髋关节骨关节炎物理治疗的黄金标准，请务必将其整合到你的临床决策中。
items.titleZh: APTA 骨科分会：髋关节疼痛与活动受限——髋骨关节炎：2025 年修订版。
items.summaryZh: APTA 骨科分会发布了关于髋关节疼痛与活动受限——髋骨关节炎的 2025 年修订版临床实践指南。
items.curatedReasonEn: The APTA Orthopedics section has released the 2025 revision of the Hip Pain and Mobility Deficits—Hip Osteoarthritis guideline. This is the gold standard for physical therapy in hip osteoarthritis; you must integrate it into your clinical decision-making.

items.title: Hand Pain and Sensory Deficits: Carpal Tunnel Syndrome Clinical Practice Guidelines
items.curatedReason: 腕管综合征 (Carpal Tunnel Syndrome) 的物理治疗临床实践指南已更新。这为你提供了最新的循证建议，确保你的评估和干预策略与时俱进。
items.titleZh: 手部疼痛和感觉缺陷：腕管综合征临床实践指南。
items.summaryZh: 针对手部疼痛和感觉缺陷的腕管综合征临床实践指南现已发布。
items.curatedReasonEn: The clinical practice guidelines for physical therapy in Carpal Tunnel Syndrome have been updated. This provides you with the latest evidence-based recommendations, ensuring your assessment and intervention strategies are current.

items.title: Treatment Guideline for Foot and Ankle
items.curatedReason: 足踝治疗指南的发布，为你提供了处理足踝问题患者的最新循证框架。这直接指导你的临床实践，让你能更有效地管理这类常见问题。
items.titleZh: 足踝治疗指南。
items.summaryZh: 一项新的足踝治疗指南现已发布，旨在指导临床实践。
items.curatedReasonEn: The release of the Foot and Ankle Treatment Guideline provides you with the latest evidence-based framework for managing patients with foot and ankle issues. This directly guides your clinical practice, enabling you to manage these common problems more effectively.

items.title: Therapeutic Management of Pediatric Hypermobility Spectrum Disorder: An Evidence-Based Care Guideline
items.curatedReason: 针对儿童高活动度谱系障碍的循证护理指南已发布。这意味着你在管理这类患者时，有了一套明确、科学的评估和干预框架，避免经验主义。
items.titleZh: 儿童高活动度谱系障碍的治疗管理：循证护理指南。
items.summaryZh: 一项关于儿童高活动度谱系障碍治疗管理的循证护理指南已发布。
items.curatedReasonEn: An evidence-based care guideline for pediatric hypermobility spectrum disorder has been released. This means you now have a clear, scientific framework for assessment and intervention when managing these patients, avoiding empiricism.

items.title: American Academy of Orthopaedic Surgeons: Management of Rotator Cuff Injuries Clinical Practice Guideline
items.curatedReason: 美国骨科医师学会发布了肩袖损伤管理临床实践指南。作为物理治疗师，理解这份指南将帮助你更好地与骨科医生协作，优化肩袖损伤患者的综合管理。
items.titleZh: 美国骨科医师学会：肩袖损伤管理临床实践指南。
items.summaryZh: 美国骨科医师学会发布了肩袖损伤管理的临床实践指南。
items.curatedReasonEn: The American Academy of Orthopaedic Surgeons has published clinical practice guidelines for the management of rotator cuff injuries. As a physical therapist, understanding these guidelines will help you collaborate more effectively with orthopedic surgeons and optimize comprehensive management for patients with rotator cuff injuries.

items.title: Global Strategy for Prevention, Diagnosis, and Management of COPD
items.curatedReason: 这是一项关于 COPD 预防、诊断和管理的全球策略指南。虽然不是直接的物理治疗指南，但了解这些宏观策略有助于你将物理治疗干预与整体管理框架相结合。
items.titleZh: COPD 预防、诊断和管理全球策略。
items.summaryZh: 这是一项关于慢性阻塞性肺疾病（COPD）预防、诊断和管理的全球策略指南。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is a global strategy guideline for the prevention, diagnosis, and management of COPD. While not a direct physiotherapy guideline, understanding these macro strategies helps you integrate physiotherapy interventions within the overall management framework.

items.title: Prescribing Exercise and Designing Physical Activity Programs for People With Disabilities
items.curatedReason: 这项指南关注为残疾人开具运动处方和设计身体活动方案。它提醒你在评估残疾患者时，不仅要关注功能受限，更要积极融入运动和身体活动以改善其整体健康和生活质量。
items.titleZh: 为残疾人开具运动处方和设计身体活动方案。
items.summaryZh: 此指南提供了为残疾人开具运动处方和设计身体活动方案的建议。
items.curatedReasonEn: This guideline focuses on prescribing exercise and designing physical activity programs for people with disabilities. It reminds you that when assessing patients with disabilities, you should not only focus on functional limitations but also actively integrate exercise and physical activity to improve their overall health and quality of life.

items.title: Concerns about practitioners
items.curatedReason: AHPRA 关于从业者担忧的指引提供了在澳大利亚报告执业不当行为的途径和流程。这提醒你作为专业人士的伦理责任，以及维护行业标准的机制。
items.titleZh: 对从业者的担忧。
items.summaryZh: AHPRA 提供关于对医疗从业者担忧的指引和报告流程。
items.curatedReasonEn: AHPRA's guidance on practitioner concerns outlines the avenues and processes for reporting professional misconduct in Australia. This reminds you of your ethical responsibilities as a professional and the mechanisms for maintaining industry standards.

items.title: What are registration standards?
items.curatedReason: AHPRA 解释了注册标准是什么以及它们对执业的意义。这帮助你理解在澳大利亚执业的基石要求，是确保合规执业的基础。
items.titleZh: 什么是注册标准？
items.summaryZh: AHPRA 解释了注册标准的定义及其在医疗执业中的重要性。
items.curatedReasonEn: AHPRA explains what registration standards are and their implications for practice. This helps you understand the fundamental requirements for practicing in Australia, which is essential for ensuring compliant practice.

items.title: I have a concern - where can I report?
items.curatedReason: AHPRA 提供了关于如何报告对健康从业者担忧的指引。这对于维护患者安全和行业职业操守至关重要，是你作为专业人士应了解的流程。
items.titleZh: 我有一个担忧——在哪里可以报告？
items.summaryZh: AHPRA 提供了关于如何报告对医疗从业者担忧的指引。
items.curatedReasonEn: AHPRA provides guidance on how to report concerns about a health practitioner. This is crucial for maintaining patient safety and professional integrity in the industry, and it's a process you, as a professional, should be aware of.

items.title: Companionship as a mediator of the relationship between marital status and psychosocial outcomes: Findings in individuals with spinal cord injury.
items.summary: This study found that companionship mediates the relationship between marital status and psychosocial outcomes in individuals with spinal cord injury, after controlling for demographic, injury, and socioeconomic factors.
items.curatedReason: 陪伴在脊髓损伤患者的婚姻状况与心理社会结局之间发挥中介作用。这提示在康复中，除了身体功能，也要关注患者的社会支持和伴侣关系，这可能直接影响他们的心理健康。
items.titleZh: 陪伴在脊髓损伤患者婚姻状况与心理社会结局关系中的中介作用。
items.summaryZh: 这项研究发现，在控制了人口统计学、损伤和经济社会特征后，陪伴在脊髓损伤患者的婚姻状况与心理社会结局之间起中介作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: Companionship mediates the relationship between marital status and psychosocial outcomes in individuals with spinal cord injury. This suggests that during rehabilitation, in addition to physical function, you should also pay attention to patients' social support and marital relationships, as these may directly impact their mental health.
items.limitation: 横断面研究，无法确定因果关系。
items.limitationEn: Cross-sectional study, unable to determine causality.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: 2025 Guideline for the Prevention, Detection, Evaluation and Management of High Blood Pressure in Adults
items.curatedReason: 2025 年成人高血压预防、检测、评估和管理指南已发布。虽然主要面向医师，但了解这些指南能帮助你更好地识别高血压患者的风险，并在康复过程中为他们提供运动和生活方式干预的建议。
items.titleZh: 2025 年成人高血压预防、检测、评估和管理指南。
items.summaryZh: 2025 年成人高血压的预防、检测、评估和管理指南已发布。
items.curatedReasonEn: The 2025 Guideline for the Prevention, Detection, Evaluation and Management of High Blood Pressure in Adults has been released. While primarily for physicians, understanding these guidelines helps you better identify risks in hypertensive patients and advise on exercise and lifestyle interventions during rehabilitation.

items.title: How to apply for registration
items.curatedReason: 这是 AHPRA 关于在澳大利亚申请注册的详细步骤。如果你正在考虑在澳大利亚执业，这份指引是你必须遵循的官方路径。
items.titleZh: 如何申请注册。
items.summaryZh: AHPRA 提供了如何在澳大利亚申请执业注册的详细信息。
items.curatedReasonEn: This details AHPRA's steps for applying for registration in Australia. If you are considering practicing in Australia, this guidance is the official path you must follow.

items.title: Check my employee's registration status
items.curatedReason: AHPRA 提供了查询从业者注册状态的工具。在雇佣新员工或核实合作方资质时，这是你确保其合规性的官方途径。
items.titleZh: 检查我的员工注册状态。
items.summaryZh: AHPRA 提供工具以供检查医疗从业者的注册状态。
items.curatedReasonEn: AHPRA provides a tool to check a practitioner's registration status. When hiring new staff or verifying partner qualifications, this is your official way to ensure compliance.

items.title: Monitoring and compliance
items.curatedReason: AHPRA 关于监管和合规的页面解释了其如何监督从业者。了解这些机制可以帮助你避免违规，并理解行业监管的范围。
items.titleZh: 监督与合规。
items.summaryZh: AHPRA 提供了关于医疗从业者监督与合规的详细信息。
items.curatedReasonEn: AHPRA's page on monitoring and compliance explains how it oversees practitioners. Understanding these mechanisms can help you avoid non-compliance and grasp the scope of industry regulation.

items.title: Has a concern been raised about you?
items.curatedReason: AHPRA 解释了当有担忧被提出时，从业者应该如何应对。如果你不幸成为被报告的对象，了解这些信息能帮助你妥善处理。
items.titleZh: 有人对你提出担忧吗？
items.summaryZh: AHPRA 提供了关于当对医疗从业者提出担忧时如何应对的信息。
items.curatedReasonEn: AHPRA explains how practitioners should respond when a concern is raised. If you unfortunately become the subject of a report, understanding this information can help you handle it appropriately.

items.title: The notifications process
items.curatedReason: AHPRA 详细阐述了担忧处理的通知流程。了解这个流程有助于你理解投诉是如何被评估和处理的，无论你是报告者还是被报告者。
items.titleZh: 通知流程。
items.summaryZh: AHPRA 详细介绍了其通知处理流程，包括担忧如何被评估和管理。
items.curatedReasonEn: AHPRA details the notification process for handling concerns. Understanding this process helps you comprehend how complaints are assessed and managed, whether you are the reporter or the reported party.

items.title: Who can make a notification
items.curatedReason: AHPRA 明确了谁可以提出担忧。这能让你知道在何种情况下，哪些人可以对从业者的行为提出正式报告。
items.titleZh: 谁可以提出通知。
items.summaryZh: AHPRA 提供了关于谁可以对医疗从业者提出正式通知的详细信息。
items.curatedReasonEn: AHPRA clarifies who can raise a concern. This lets you know under what circumstances and which individuals can formally report a practitioner's conduct.

items.title: Multidimensional factors associated with community reintegration in the early chronic phase after stroke: the role of fear-related activity avoidance.
items.summary: In the early chronic phase after stroke (3-6 months), multidimensional factors including fear-related activity avoidance are associated with community reintegration, with avoidance being a key factor for restricted participation.
items.curatedReason: 卒中后早期慢性期（3-6个月）患者的社区回归受多维度因素影响，其中“恐惧相关活动回避”是关键因素。在康复中，除了身体功能，你需要更多关注患者的心理因素和回避行为。
items.titleZh: 卒中早期慢性期社区回归相关的多维度因素：恐惧相关活动回避的作用
items.summaryZh: 卒中后早期慢性期（3-6 个月）患者的社区回归受多维度因素影响，其中恐惧相关活动回避是限制参与的关键因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: Community reintegration in the early chronic phase (3-6 months) post-stroke is influenced by multidimensional factors, with "fear-related activity avoidance" being a key determinant. In rehabilitation, you need to pay more attention to psychological factors and avoidance behaviors in addition to physical function.
items.limitation: 本研究是观察性研究，不能确定因果关系，且主要关注早期慢性期。
items.limitationEn: This was an observational study, which cannot establish causality and primarily focused on the early chronic phase.

items.title: Innovative technologies for gait rehabilitation in incomplete spinal cord injury: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis synthesized current evidence on technological interventions for gait rehabilitation in adults with incomplete spinal cord injury, highlighting their efficacy.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析强调了创新技术在不完全脊髓损伤（iSCI）步态康复中的潜力。在为 iSCI 患者设计康复方案时，你可以优先考虑整合这些有强证据支持的技术，以优化步态功能恢复。
items.titleZh: 不完全脊髓损伤步态康复中的创新技术：系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析综合了不完全脊髓损伤成人步态康复中技术干预的现有证据，强调了其有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis highlights the potential of innovative technologies in gait rehabilitation for incomplete spinal cord injury (iSCI). When designing rehabilitation protocols for iSCI patients, prioritize integrating these strongly evidenced technologies to optimize gait function recovery.
items.limitation: 不同技术类型、患者特征和随访时间上的异质性较高，限制了某些具体干预措施的普适性推荐。
items.limitationEn: High heterogeneity in technology types, patient characteristics, and follow-up durations limits the generalizability of specific intervention recommendations.
items.journal: PM & R : the journal of injury, function, and rehabilitation

items.title: Two-Year Outcomes of the Proximal Hamstring Avulsion Rehabilitation Regimes: Longitudinal Versus Accelerated Protocol (PHARRLAP) Study: A Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial with 2-year follow-up found that an accelerated rehabilitation protocol was non-inferior to a longitudinal protocol for proximal hamstring avulsion repair, with similar clinical outcomes, strength, and functional symmetry.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 的两年随访数据证实，加速康复方案在近端腘绳肌撕脱伤术后恢复中，与传统方案相比在临床结局、力量和功能对称性上具有非劣效性。这为你提供了更早介入主动康复的证据支持。
items.titleZh: 近端腘绳肌撕脱伤康复方案的两年结局：纵向与加速方案（PHARRLAP）研究：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项为期两年的随机对照试验显示，加速康复方案在近端腘绳肌撕脱伤修复后，与纵向方案在临床结局、力量和功能对称性方面无显著差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: Two-year follow-up data from this RCT confirm that an accelerated rehabilitation protocol is non-inferior to traditional protocols in clinical outcomes, strength, and functional symmetry after proximal hamstring avulsion repair. This provides evidence to support earlier active rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 研究对象主要为运动员，其依从性和康复能力可能高于一般人群，结果外推需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study subjects were primarily athletes, whose adherence and rehabilitation capabilities might be higher than the general population, so results should be extrapolated with caution.
items.journal: The American journal of sports medicine

items.title: Barriers and Trends to Early Mobilization in Children With a Traumatic Brain Injury.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study identified common barriers to early mobility in pediatric ICU patients with traumatic brain injury, including sedation, mechanical ventilation, and medical instability.
items.curatedReason: 对于儿童创伤性脑损伤患者，早期活动面临多种障碍，包括镇静和通气。你在设计康复方案时，应识别并尽可能解决这些可控因素，以促进更早的活动。
items.titleZh: 创伤性脑损伤儿童早期活动中的障碍与趋势
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究描述了儿童创伤性脑损伤患者在儿科ICU中早期活动的情况，并识别了镇静、机械通气等主要障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: Early mobilization for children with traumatic brain injury faces multiple barriers, including sedation and ventilation. When designing rehabilitation protocols, you should identify and, where possible, address these modifiable factors to facilitate earlier activity.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性单中心研究，结果可能受到选择偏倚的影响，且外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This retrospective single-center study may be subject to selection bias and has limited generalizability.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Treadmill training with rhythmic auditory cueing and/or visual feedback for persons with Multiple Sclerosis: feasibility and effects on gait parameters in a clinical randomized controlled trial
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (N=56) found that treadmill training with visual feedback and/or rhythmic auditory cueing was feasible and showed promising effects on gait parameters in persons with Multiple Sclerosis.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 表明，结合视觉反馈和/或节律性听觉提示的跑台训练对多发性硬化症患者的步态参数是可行且有效的。这些辅助手段为多发性硬化症患者的步态训练提供了有前景的策略。
items.titleZh: 节律性听觉提示和/或视觉反馈跑台训练对多发性硬化症患者步态参数的可行性及效果：一项临床随机对照试验。
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（N=56）发现，结合视觉反馈和/或节律性听觉提示的跑台训练对多发性硬化症患者的步态参数是可行且显示出积极效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT indicates that treadmill training with visual feedback and/or rhythmic auditory cueing is feasible and effective for gait parameters in Multiple Sclerosis patients. These adjuncts offer promising strategies for gait training in MS.
items.limitation: 该研究为临床可行性试验，样本量（N=56）较小，且主要关注短期步态参数，长期功能改善仍需进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: This is a clinical feasibility trial with a small sample size (N=56), primarily focusing on short-term gait parameters; long-term functional improvement requires further validation.

items.title: Rehabilitation and Management in Lateral Medullary Stroke (Wallenberg Syndrome): A Scoping Review and Evidence Map.
items.summary: A scoping review and evidence map provides a comprehensive overview of rehabilitation interventions for lateral medullary stroke (Wallenberg Syndrome), distinguishing direct intervention evidence from management and assessment reports.
items.curatedReason: 这篇范围综述和证据图为外侧延髓卒中（Wallenberg综合征）的康复干预提供了全面的概览。它帮你识别现有证据和知识空白，从而更好地指导临床实践和未来研究方向。
items.titleZh: 外侧延髓卒中（Wallenberg综合征）的康复和管理：范围综述和证据图
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述和证据图全面概述了外侧延髓卒中（Wallenberg综合征）的康复干预措施，并区分了直接干预证据与管理和评估报告。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review and evidence map provide a comprehensive overview of rehabilitation interventions for lateral medullary stroke (Wallenberg Syndrome). It helps you identify existing evidence and knowledge gaps, guiding clinical practice and future research.
items.limitation: 范围综述的局限在于不进行证据质量评估，因此无法对特定干预措施的有效性给出强推荐。
items.limitationEn: A limitation of scoping reviews is that they do not assess evidence quality, thus precluding strong recommendations for specific interventions.

items.title: Perceptions of Chronic Low Back Pain and Physiotherapy in India: A Qualitative Study.
items.summary: A qualitative study in India identified that chronic low back pain patients face barriers to physiotherapy due to cultural factors like pain stigmatization, over-reliance on analgesics, and low awareness of PT's role.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究揭示了印度文化背景下慢性腰痛患者对物理治疗的认知障碍，例如对疼痛的污名化、过度依赖止痛药和缺乏PT意识。了解这些能帮你更好地与患者沟通，降低依从性屏障。
items.titleZh: 印度慢性腰痛患者对物理治疗的认知：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项在印度的定性研究发现，慢性腰痛患者在寻求物理治疗时面临文化障碍，如疼痛污名化、过度依赖止痛药及对PT作用认知不足。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study highlights barriers to physiotherapy perception among chronic LBP patients in India, such as pain stigmatization, over-reliance on analgesics, and lack of PT awareness. Understanding these factors can help you improve patient communication and adherence.
items.limitation: 定性研究结果的普遍性受限于特定文化背景。
items.limitationEn: The generalizability of qualitative study findings is limited by specific cultural contexts.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Barriers, facilitators and promising interventions for reducing sedentary behaviour during and after stroke rehabilitation - A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review identified barriers, facilitators, and promising behavior change techniques for reducing sedentary behavior during and after stroke rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 卒中康复期间及之后减少久坐行为的干预措施仍需改进。这份范围综述识别了潜在的障碍、促进因素和行为改变技术，你在设计康复方案时可以参考这些策略来鼓励患者活动，但需注意目前尚无确切的“最佳”干预方案。
items.titleZh: 卒中康复期间及之后减少久坐行为的障碍、促进因素和有前景干预措施：范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述识别了卒中康复期间及之后减少久坐行为的障碍、促进因素和有前景的行为改变技术。
items.curatedReasonEn: Interventions to reduce sedentary behavior during and after stroke rehabilitation need improvement. This scoping review identifies potential barriers, facilitators, and behavior change techniques; you can refer to these strategies to encourage patient activity in your rehabilitation plans, but note there's no definitive 'best' intervention yet.
items.limitation: 范围综述侧重广度而非深度，无法提供具体干预措施的疗效量化数据。
items.limitationEn: The scoping review prioritizes breadth over depth, so it cannot provide quantified efficacy data for specific interventions.

items.title: Critically appraised papers: Adding physiotherapy or motivational text messages does not improve pain beyond home exercise alone for degenerative meniscal tear and knee pain [synopsis].
items.summary: This synopsis reviews a study indicating that for degenerative meniscal tears and knee pain, adding physiotherapy or motivational text messages does not improve pain beyond home exercise alone.
items.curatedReason: 针对退行性半月板撕裂，在家庭锻炼基础上增加物理治疗或励志短信并不能显著改善疼痛。这意味着目前证据不支持复杂干预优于简单家庭方案，继续坚持主动训练是核心。
items.titleZh: 评价论文：退行性半月板撕裂及膝痛患者，额外增加物理治疗或激励短信不比单纯居家锻炼更能改善疼痛
items.summaryZh: 一篇论文综述指出，针对退行性半月板撕裂和膝痛，在家庭锻炼基础上增加物理治疗或激励短信，未能比单纯家庭锻炼更显著地改善疼痛。
items.curatedReasonEn: For degenerative meniscal tears, adding physiotherapy or motivational text messages to home exercise doesn't significantly improve pain. This suggests that current evidence doesn't support complex interventions as superior to simple home programs; active training remains central.

items.title: Smallest worthwhile effect of anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction compared with non-surgical management: a benefit-harm trade-off study.
items.summary: This study estimated the smallest worthwhile effect of ACL reconstruction followed by rehabilitation versus rehabilitation only, for improving knee function and return to sport, and explored associations with participant characteristics.
items.curatedReason: 韧带重建（ACL）结合康复与单纯康复相比，其膝关节功能改善和重返运动所需的最小效应量已得到估算。这提供了实用的临床决策参考，帮助你与患者沟通手术与非手术治疗的预期效益。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建与非手术治疗相比的最小有效效应：一项效益-风险权衡研究
items.summaryZh: 这项研究估算了前交叉韧带（ACL）重建结合康复与单纯康复相比，改善膝关节功能和重返运动的最小有效效应，并探讨了与参与者特征的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: The smallest worthwhile effect of ACL reconstruction plus rehabilitation versus rehabilitation alone for improving knee function and return to sport has been estimated. This provides practical clinical decision-making reference, helping you communicate expected benefits of surgical versus non-surgical treatment with patients.
items.limitation: 研究的 benefit-harm trade-off 评估可能受限于患者偏好和感知风险的个体差异。
items.limitationEn: The benefit-harm trade-off assessment in the study may be limited by individual differences in patient preferences and perceived risks.

items.title: Critically appraised paper: Mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation improved exercise capacity as much as and health status more than centre-based pulmonary rehabilitation for chronic obstructive pulmonary disease [commentary].
items.summary: This commentary reviews a paper stating that mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation improved exercise capacity as much as, and health status more than, center-based pulmonary rehabilitation for COPD.
items.curatedReason: 移动端肺康复在改善 COPD 患者运动能力方面与中心化肺康复效果相当，且在健康状况方面更优。这强有力地支持了移动医疗在慢性肺病管理中的应用，你可以将移动端方案作为中心化康复的有效替代或补充。
items.titleZh: 评价论文：移动端肺康复对慢性阻塞性肺疾病患者运动能力的改善与中心化肺康复相当，健康状况改善更优
items.summaryZh: 一篇评论文章指出，针对慢性阻塞性肺疾病（COPD），移动端肺康复在改善运动能力方面与中心化肺康复相当，而在健康状况方面表现更优。
items.curatedReasonEn: Mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation is as effective as center-based pulmonary rehabilitation in improving exercise capacity for COPD patients, and even superior in health status. This strongly supports the use of mobile health in chronic lung disease management, allowing you to use mobile solutions as an effective alternative or supplement to center-based rehabilitation.

items.title: Elevance Health to exit small-group ACA market in 1 state
items.summary: Elevance Health is set to exit the small-group Affordable Care Act (ACA) market in one US state, potentially impacting insurance options for small businesses.
items.curatedReason: Elevance Health 退出俄亥俄州小团体 ACA 市场，这会影响当地小团体医疗保险的可及性和成本。你可能需要关注其对患者转介和报销政策的潜在影响。
items.titleZh: Elevance Health 将退出一州的小团体 ACA 市场
items.summaryZh: Elevance Health 计划退出美国一州的小团体平价医疗法案（ACA）市场，可能影响小企业的保险选择。
items.curatedReasonEn: Elevance Health's exit from the Ohio small-group ACA market will impact the availability and cost of small-group health insurance there. You may need to monitor its potential effects on patient referrals and reimbursement policies.

items.title: Inter-rater reliability and construct validity of a cross-diagnostic movement quality score for rehabilitation assessment.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study of 84 hospitalized rehabilitation patients found good inter-rater reliability and construct validity for a Movement Quality Score (MQS) within the Standard Physical Therapy Assessment (SPTA) across neurological, musculoskeletal, and internal medical conditions.
items.curatedReason: 运动质量评分 (MQS) 在住院康复患者中表现出良好的评估者间信度和结构效度，无论患者诊断如何。在跨诊断人群中使用 MQS，你将有更可靠的基线评估工具。
items.titleZh: 跨诊断运动质量评分在康复评估中的评估者间信度和结构效度
items.summaryZh: 一项对 84 名住院康复患者进行的横断面研究发现，标准物理治疗评估 (SPTA) 中的运动质量评分 (MQS) 在神经、肌肉骨骼和内科疾病患者中均表现出良好的评估者间信度和结构效度。
